title: гҖҗжқӮйЎ№гҖ‘STL еңЁз®—жі•з«һиөӣйҮҢзҡ„еә”з”Ё (bitset / priority queue)
content: STL е…¶е®һзӣёеҪ“дәҺи®°еҪ•дёҖдёӢеҒҡиҝҮзҡ„жқӮйўҳпјҢжӣҙеғҸжҖқз»ҙйўҳпјҢжІЎжңүжҳҺзЎ®зҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№ priority_queue гҖҗдјҳе…ҲйҳҹеҲ—з»ҙжҠӨеҗҲжі•жғ…еҶөгҖ‘CF2001D Longest Max Min SubsequenceжҖқи·Ҝе·Із»ҸеӨ§иҮҙжғіеҮәжқҘдәҶпјҢе°ұжҳҜжІЎжңүжғіеҲ°жҖҺд№Ҳз»ҙжҠӨпјҢзңӢеҲ°йўҳи§ЈжүҚжҒҚз„¶еӨ§жӮҹжҖқи·ҜжҳҜпјҢиҙӘеҝғзҡ„жһ„йҖ гҖӮйўҳзӣ®жқЎд»¶зӣёеҪ“дәҺжҳҜиҜҙпјҢз¬¬ 111 дёӘж•°е°ҪйҮҸеӨ§гҖҒз¬¬ 222 дёӘж•°е°ҪйҮҸе°ҸгҖҒз¬¬ 333 дёӘж•°е°ҪйҮҸеӨ§вҖҰвҖҰйҰ–е…ҲеҸҜд»ҘжғіеҲ°зҡ„дёҖзӮ№жҳҜпјҢдёҚйҮҚеӨҚзҡ„гҖҒжңҖй•ҝзҡ„еәҸеҲ—дёҖе®ҡеҢ…еҗ«дәҶжүҖжңүдёҚеҗҢзҡ„ж•°пјҢеҰӮжһңжңү mmm дёӘдёҚеҗҢзҡ„ж•°пјҢеҲҷжңҖй•ҝй•ҝеәҰе°ұжҳҜ mmmгҖӮз„¶еҗҺжҖқиҖғеҰӮдҪ•жһ„йҖ гҖӮйҰ–е…ҲеҸҜд»ҘжғіеҲ°пјҡжҲ‘д»¬жҖ»жҳҜеҸ–жңҖеӨ§гҖҒеҸ–жңҖе°ҸгҖҒеҸ–жңҖеӨ§гҖҒеҸ–жңҖе°ҸвҖҰвҖҰдҪҶиҝҷж ·жңүдёҖдёӘй—®йўҳпјҢдҫӢеҰӮ 2 10 5 4 5 4 5 4пјҢеҰӮжһңдёҖдёҠжқҘе°ұеҸ– 101010пјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ 222 е°ұеҸ–дёҚеҲ°дәҶгҖӮжүҖд»ҘпјҢжҲ‘д»¬йўқеӨ–и®°еҪ•жҜҸдёҖз§Қж•°жңҖеҗҺдёҖж¬ЎеҮәзҺ°еңЁе“ӘйҮҢ pip_ipiвҖӢпјҢз„¶еҗҺжҲ‘д»¬еҸӘеңЁеҪ“еүҚдҪҚзҪ®еҲ°дёӢдёҖж¬ЎжңҖиҝ‘зҡ„ pip_ipiвҖӢ д№ӢеүҚеҸ–еҖјпјҢиҝҷж ·е°ұиғҪдҝқиҜҒжҖ»жҳҜиғҪеҸ–еҲ°жңҖеҖјеҫ—еҗҢж—¶пјҢдёҚдјҡжјҸжҺүжҹҗдёҖдёӘж•°гҖӮеҰӮдҪ•з»ҙжҠӨдҪҚзҪ®жңүж•Ҳзҡ„жңҖеҖје‘ўпјҹжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ё std::priority_queue з»ҙжҠӨеҖје’ҢдҪҚзҪ®зҡ„ pairпјҢз»ҙжҠӨзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢеј№еҮәжүҖжңүдёҚз¬ҰеҗҲиҰҒжұӮзҡ„е ҶйЎ¶пјҲеҖје·Із»Ҹиў«з”ЁиҝҮгҖҒжҲ–иҖ…дҪҚзҪ®е°ҸдәҺзӯүдәҺеҪ“еүҚдҪҚзҪ®пјүпјҢиҝҷж ·е ҶйЎ¶е°ұдёҖе®ҡжҳҜз¬ҰеҗҲиҰҒжұӮзҡ„жңҖеҖјгҖӮCode1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344/* ============================ CONFIG BEGIN ============================ */using Node = array<int, 2>;/* ============================= CONFIG END ============================= */void solve() { int n; cin >> n; vector<int> a(n), lastpos(n + 1, 1e9); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) cin >> a[i], --a[i], lastpos[a[i]] = i; priority_queue<int, vector<int>, greater<int>> rp(lastpos.begin(), lastpos.end()); priority_queue<Node, vector<Node>, greater<Node>> mn, mx; for (int i = 0; i <= rp.top(); i++) { mx.push({-a[i], i}); mn.push({a[i], i}); } vector<int> ans; vector<int> used(n, 0); while (!mx.empty() && !mn.empty()) { auto [x, pos] = (ans.size() & 1 ? mn.top() : mx.top()); if (ans.size() & 1) mn.pop(); else mx.pop(), x *= -1; ans.push_back(x); used[x] = 1; while (rp.top() < n && used[a[rp.top()]]) { int p = rp.top(); rp.pop(); for (int k = p + 1; k <= min(rp.top(), n - 1); k++) { mx.push({-a[k], k}); mn.push({a[k], k}); } } while (!mx.empty() && (used[-mx.top()[0]] || mx.top()[1] <= pos)) mx.pop(); while (!mn.empty() && (used[mn.top()[0]] || mn.top()[1] <= pos)) mn.pop(); } cout << ans.size() << endl; for (auto i : ans) cout << i + 1 << " "; cout << endl;} bitset зӣёе…і CF еҚҡе®ў std::bitset еҸҜд»Ҙ дҪңдёәжЎ¶з»ҹи®ЎжҳҜеҗҰеҮәзҺ°иҝҮ дёҖдёӘе»¶з”іпјҡеҸҜд»Ҙз»ҙжҠӨеҒҸеәҸе…ізі» йҖҡиҝҮжҢүдҪҚжҲ–пјҢз»ҙжҠӨеўһеҲ иҫ№ DAG иҝһйҖҡжҖ§/еҸҜиҫҫжҖ§ bitset ж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„дёҖдәӣж“ҚдҪңMethodsWhat can it do?any()иӢҘеӯҳеңЁжҹҗдёҖдҪҚжҳҜ true еҲҷиҝ”еӣһ trueпјҢеҗҰеҲҷиҝ”еӣһ falseгҖӮnone()иӢҘжүҖжңүдҪҚйғҪжҳҜ false еҲҷиҝ”еӣһ trueпјҢеҗҰеҲҷиҝ”еӣһ falseгҖӮreset() reset(v)жүҖжңүдҪҚйҮҚзҪ®дёә 000з¬¬ vvv дҪҚйҮҚзҪ®дёә 000 bitset з»ҙжҠӨй«ҳз»ҙеҒҸеәҸеҒҮе®ҡжңү nnn дёӘе…ғзҙ пјҢmmm дёӘеұһжҖ§еҖјпјҢеҲ©з”Ё std::bitset еҸҜд»ҘеңЁ O(n2mw)O(\frac{n^2m}{w})O(wn2mвҖӢ) зҡ„ж—¶й—ҙеҶ…з»ҙжҠӨеҒҸеәҸе…ізі»жҲ‘д»¬еҒҮе®ҡ bitset[i][j] = 1 иЎЁзӨәж»Ўи¶і aiВ opВ aja_i \text{ op } a_jaiвҖӢВ opВ ajвҖӢгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬д»Һз¬¬дёҖз»ҙејҖе§ӢжһҡдёҫжүҖжңүз»ҙеәҰпјҢеҜ№жҜҸдёҖз»ҙйғҪжҺ’еәҸпјҢдҪҝеҫ—еүҚеҗҺзҡ„е…ғзҙ еңЁиҝҷдёҖз»ҙдёҠж»Ўи¶іеҒҸеәҸе…ізі»гҖӮз„¶еҗҺпјҢжҲ‘д»¬д»ҺеүҚеҫҖеҗҺйҒҚеҺҶжүҖжңүе…ғзҙ пјҢз”ЁдёҖдёӘз©әзҡ„дёҙж—¶ bitset a и®°еҪ•жҺ’еәҸдёӯеҮәзҺ°зҡ„еүҚеҮ дёӘе…ғзҙ пјҢйӮЈд№ҲеҪ“жҲ‘жһҡдёҫеҲ°з¬¬ iii дёӘе…ғзҙ зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢиҝҷдёӘ a йҮҢе°ұи®°еҪ•еҘҪдәҶеңЁиҝҷдёҖз»ҙжңүйӮЈдәӣе…ғзҙ жҳҜе’Ңз¬¬ iii дёӘе…ғзҙ ж»Ўи¶іеҒҸеәҸе…ізі»зҡ„гҖӮйӮЈд№ҲжҲ‘д»¬е°ұжӢҝ bitset[i] &= aпјҢеӣ дёәжҜҸжһҡдёҫдёҖдёӘз»ҙеәҰпјҢжҲ‘йғҪиғҪзҹҘйҒ“е“Әдәӣе…ғзҙ е’ҢиҝҷдёӘе…ғзҙ пјҲеңЁиҝҷдёҖз»ҙпјүж»Ўи¶іеҒҸеәҸе…ізі»пјҢйӮЈд№ҲеҸӘиҰҒжүҖжңүз»ҙеәҰдёҠйғҪе’ҢиҝҷдёӘе…ғзҙ ж»Ўи¶іеҒҸеәҸе…ізі»пјҢе°ұдёҖе®ҡж»Ўи¶ійўҳзӣ®зҡ„еҒҸеәҸе…ізі»гҖӮжңҙзҙ  bitset еҶҷжі•дёҖ12345678910111213bitset<N> bits[N], tmp;for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { bits[i].set(); // еҲқе§ӢеҢ–}for(int dimension = 1; dimension <= D; dimension++) { sort( ... ); // иҝҷйҮҢеҜ№жҢүеҒҸеәҸиҰҒжұӮиҝӣиЎҢжҺ’еәҸ tmp.reset(); for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { bits[ ... ] &= tmp; // ж–№жӢ¬еҸ·йҮҢжҺ’е®ҢеәҸеҗҺпјҢжҸҗеҸ–зҡ„ id tmp.set( ... ); }}жңҙзҙ  bitset еҶҷжі•дәҢ1234567891011bitset<N> bits[N], tmp;for(int dimension = 1; dimension <= D; dimension++) { sort( ... ); // иҝҷйҮҢеҜ№жҢүеҒҸеәҸиҰҒжұӮиҝӣиЎҢжҺ’еәҸ tmp.reset(); for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { if(dimension != 1)bits[ ... ] &= tmp; // ж–№жӢ¬еҸ·йҮҢжҺ’е®ҢеәҸеҗҺпјҢжҸҗеҸ–зҡ„ id else bits[ ... ] = tmp; // гҖҗеҢәеҲ«гҖ‘еңЁдәҺпјҢиҰҒеҜ№з¬¬дёҖз»ҙеҒҡзү№ж®ҠеҲӨж–ӯ tmp.set( ... ); }}ж—¶й—ҙж¶ҲиҖ—жңҖеӨ§зҡ„жҳҜ bitset ж“ҚдҪңжҳҜ O(nw)O(\frac nw)O(wnвҖӢ) зҡ„гҖӮbitset й«ҳз»ҙеҒҸеәҸдјҳеҢ–з©әй—ҙеҪ“ nвүӨ50000n\le 50000nвүӨ50000 ж—¶пјҢbitset<50000> bits[50000] е°ұдёҚзҺ°е®һдәҶпјҢз©әй—ҙдјҡзӮёгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еҜ№ж•°жҚ®иҝӣиЎҢзҰ»ж•ЈеҢ–пјҢиҝҷж ·еҖјеҹҹиҢғеӣҙйҷҚеҲ° O(N)O(N)O(N)гҖӮз„¶еҗҺжҲ‘д»¬еҜ№еҖјеҹҹиҝӣиЎҢеҲҶеқ—е№¶дҪҝз”ЁеүҚзјҖе’ҢжҖқжғіпјҢbitset[p][i] иЎЁзӨәз¬¬ ppp з»ҙйҮҢпјҢпјҲзҰ»ж•ЈеҢ–еҗҺзҡ„пјүжқғеҖј вүӨiГ—BlockВ Size\le i\times \text{Block Size}вүӨiГ—BlockВ Size зҡ„е…ғзҙ йӣҶеҗҲ (bitset[p][i][j] = 1 иҜҙжҳҺ jjj еҸ·е…ғзҙ еңЁз¬¬ ppp з»ҙйҮҢжҺ’еүҚ iГ—BlockВ Sizei\times \text{Block Size}iГ—BlockВ Size)иҝҷж ·зҡ„иҜқпјҢжҜҸдёӘиҜўй—®еҸҜд»ҘеҲҶжҲҗдёҖдёӘпјҲеүҚзјҖзҡ„пјүж•ҙеқ—е’ҢдёҖдёӘж•Јеқ—пјҢж•ҙеқ—зӣҙжҺҘеңЁйў„еӨ„зҗҶзҡ„ bitset[][] дёҠжҹҘжүҫпјҢж•Јеқ—зӣҙжҺҘжҡҙеҠӣ set()пјҢжңҖеҗҺеҜ№жүҖжңүз»ҙеәҰеҒҡжҢүдҪҚдёҺгҖӮеҲҶеқ—+еүҚзјҖе’Ңз©әй—ҙдјҳеҢ– bitset з»ҙжҠӨй«ҳз»ҙеҒҸеәҸ1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374#define FOR(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i <= b; i++)#define ROF(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i >= b; i--)/* ============================ CONFIG BEGIN ============================ */constexpr int N = 5e4 + 5;constexpr int B = 250;constexpr int D = 7;struct Node { int val[D + 1];} node[N]; // е®ҡд№үдәҶжҜҸдёҖдёӘ Nodeint n, d;int rnk[D + 1][N], where[D + 1][N];// rnk[D][i] = j: з¬¬ D з»ҙйҮҢпјҢжҺ’еҗҚз¬¬ i зҡ„жҳҜеҺҹжқҘ id = j зҡ„е…ғзҙ // where[D][i] = j: з¬¬ D з»ҙйҮҢпјҢid = i зҡ„е…ғзҙ жҺ’еҗҚдёә jbitset<N> bit[D + 1][B];// bit[D][B]: з¬¬ D з»ҙйҮҢпјҢ1~B еқ—йҮҢпјҢзӮ№зҡ„йӣҶеҗҲзҡ„еүҚзјҖvoid work() { int F[N]; // дёҙж—¶ж•°з»„пјҢи®°еҪ•жҺ’еҗҚ iota(F, F + N, 0); FOR(i, 1, d) { sort(F + 1, F + 1 + n, [&](auto a, auto b) { return node[a].val[i] < node[b].val[i]; }); // жҢүз¬¬ i з»ҙзҡ„еҒҸеәҸе…ізі»жҺ’еәҸ FOR(j, 1, n) rnk[i][j] = F[j], where[i][F[j]] = j; // и®°еҪ•дҝЎжҒҜпјҢж„Ҹд№үи§ҒдёҠйқў } // йў„еӨ„зҗҶеүҚзјҖеҲҶеқ— FOR(i, 1, d) { FOR(b, 1, n / B) { // еӣ дёәеҲҶеқ—жҳҜеүҚзјҖзҡ„пјҢжүҖд»Ҙе…ҲзӣҙжҺҘд»ҺдёҠдёҖеқ—з»§жүҝиҝҮжқҘ bit[i][b] |= bit[i][b - 1]; FOR(j, (b - 1) * B + 1, b * B) { bit[i][b].set(rnk[i][j]); // жҡҙеҠӣи®°еҪ•еҪ“еүҚеқ— } } } bitset<N> tmp, ans; // ans: зӯ”жЎҲпјҢеӨҡе°‘зӮ№е’ҢиҝҷдёӘзӮ№ж»Ўи¶іеҒҸеәҸе…ізі» FOR(i, 1, n) { ans.set(); FOR(k, 1, d) { // жҜҸдёҖз»ҙйғҪиҰҒйҮҚзҪ® tmp.reset(); // зӣҙжҺҘе…ҲеҸ–ж•ҙеқ— int p = where[k][i] / B; tmp |= bit[k][p]; // жҡҙеҠӣи®°еҪ•ж•Јеқ—гҖӮ // еҰӮжһңиҝҷйҮҢ where[k][i] ж”№жҲҗ where[k][i]-1пјҢ // йӮЈд№ҲдёӢйқўзҡ„ ans.count() е°ұдёҚйңҖиҰҒ -1 дәҶ FOR(j, p * B + 1, where[k][i]) { tmp.set(rnk[k][j]); } // жҢүдҪҚдёҺ ans &= tmp; } // иҫ“еҮәзӯ”жЎҲпјҲжҠҠиҮӘе·ұеҺ»жҺүпјү cout << ans.count() - 1 << endl; }}/* ============================= CONFIG END ============================= */void solve() { cin >> n >> d; FOR(i, 1, n) { FOR(j, 1, d) { cin >> node[i].val[j]; } } work();} гҖҗbitset з»ҹи®ЎжҳҜеҗҰеҮәзҺ°гҖ‘ LibreOJ 515. гҖҢLibreOJ ОІ Round #2гҖҚиҙӘеҝғеҸӘиғҪиҝҮж ·дҫӢTP LINKдёҖдёӘжҜ”иҫғжҳҫз„¶зҡ„ пјҲеӯҳеңЁжҖ§пјүDP жҳҜпјҢи®° dp(i,j)dp(i,j)dp(i,j) дёәеүҚ iii дёӘз»„еҗҲзҡ„е’ҢжҳҜеҗҰеҸҜиғҪжҳҜ jjjпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳд»Һ iвҲ’1i-1iвҲ’1 иҪ¬з§»иҝҮжқҘзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢжһҡдёҫз¬¬ iii дёӘж•°зҡ„еҸ–еҖјdp(i,j)=вҲЁk=aibidp(iвҲ’1,jвҲ’k2)dp(i,j)=\lor_{k=a_i}^{b_i}dp(i-1,j-k^2)dp(i,j)=вҲЁk=aiвҖӢbiвҖӢвҖӢdp(iвҲ’1,jвҲ’k2)йҒҚеҺҶ iii жҳҜ O(n)O(n)O(n)пјӣжһҡдёҫ jjj жҳҜеҖјеҹҹеӨ§е°Ҹзҡ„пјҢжңҖеӨ§дёә nГ—n2=n3n\times n^2=n^3nГ—n2=n3пјӣжӯӨеӨ–пјҢжһҡдёҫ kkk жҳҜ O(n)O(n)O(n) зҡ„гҖӮжҖ»ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰжҳҜ O(n5)O(n^5)O(n5)дҪҶеҰӮжһңжҲ‘д»¬з”Ё std::bitset жқҘдҪңдёәжЎ¶пјҢе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҸ‘зҺ° dp(iвҲ’1,вҖҰвҖү)dp(i-1, \dots)dp(iвҲ’1,вҖҰ) е·Ұз§» k2k^2k2 дҪҚпјҢе°ұд»ЈиЎЁеҜ№жҜҸдёҖдёӘжЎ¶йғҪ +k2+k^2+k2гҖӮеӣ жӯӨ O(n3)O(n^3)O(n3) еҸҜд»Ҙиў«дјҳеҢ–еҲ° O(n3w)O(\frac{n^3}{w})O(wn3вҖӢ)пјҢеӣ дёә nвүӨ100,w=64n\le 100,w=64nвүӨ100,w=64пјҢеӣ жӯӨеӨҚжқӮеәҰзӣёеҪ“дәҺ O(n4)O(n^4)O(n4)пјҢе°ұеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮдәҶCode123456789101112131415161718192021222324/* ============================ CONFIG BEGIN ============================ */constexpr int N = 101;int a[N], b[N];int n;bitset<N *N *N> dp[N];/* ============================= CONFIG END ============================= */void solve() { cin >> n; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { cin >> a[i] >> b[i]; } dp[0][0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = a[i]; j <= b[i]; j++) { dp[i] |= dp[i - 1] << (j * j); } } cout << dp[n].count() << endl;}гҖҗbitset з»ҙжҠӨиҝһйҖҡжҖ§гҖ‘ Gym 100345H. Settling the Universe UpдёҖдёӘжҜ”иҫғз»Ҹе…ёзҡ„з”Ё std::bitset жқҘз»ҙжҠӨ DAG иҝһйҖҡжҖ§зҡ„йўҳзӣ®гҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еҸӘе…іеҝғд»ҺзӮ№ uuu еҮәеҸ‘иғҪеҲ°иҫҫд»Җд№ҲзӮ№пјҢиҖҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘеҸ‘зҺ°пјҢеҰӮжһң uuu иғҪеҲ° vvv дё” vvv иғҪеҲ° wwwпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ uuu д№ҹдёҖе®ҡеҸҜд»ҘеҲ° wwwгҖӮ еҰӮжһңжҲ‘д»¬з”Ё bitset[u][v] = 1 иЎЁзӨә uuu еҸҜд»ҘеҲ° vvvпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ bitset[u] |= bitset[v] е°ұд»ЈиЎЁ uuu еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮ uвҶ’vu\to vuвҶ’v иҝҷжқЎиҫ№пјҢеҲ°иҫҫжүҖжңү vvv еҸҜд»ҘеҲ°иҫҫзҡ„зӮ№гҖӮдёҖиҲ¬иҝҷзұ»йўҳзӣ®жңүдёҖз§ҚйҖҡз”ЁжҖқжғіпјҢз”Ё bitset1[] дҝқеӯҳжүҖжңүзҡ„иҫ№пјҢз”ЁеҸҰдёҖдёӘ bitset2[] и®°еҪ•еҸҜиҫҫзӮ№пјҢиҪ¬з§»зӣҙжҺҘжҢүдҪҚжҲ–пјҢжқЎд»¶жҳҜжңүиҫ№ bitset[u][v] == 1гҖӮи®°еҫ—иҰҒеңЁ bitset2[i] жҠҠ i и®ҫзҪ®дёә 111пјҲиҮӘе·ұеҸҜд»ҘеҲ°иҫҫиҮӘе·ұпјүеҜ№дәҺиҝҷйўҳпјҢжҜҸж¬ЎеўһеҲ иҫ№д№ӢеҗҺйғҪйҮҚж–°з”Ё bitset жҡҙеҠӣз»ҙжҠӨдёҖдёӢпјҢжҡҙеҠӣзҡ„ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰжҳҜ O(n2w)O(\frac{n^2}{w})O(wn2вҖӢ)пјҢжҖ»ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰжҳҜ O(kn2w)O(\frac{kn^2}{w})O(wkn2вҖӢ)Code12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455#define FOR(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i <= b; i++)#define ROF(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i >= b; i--)/* ============================ CONFIG BEGIN ============================ */constexpr int N = 205;bitset<N> g[N], b[N];int n, m;i64 sum{0};void update() { FOR(i, 1, n) b[i].reset(); sum = 0; ROF(i, n, 1) { b[i].set(i); ROF(j, i - 1, 1) { if (g[j][i]) { b[j] |= b[i]; } } sum += b[i].count() - 1; }}/* ============================= CONFIG END ============================= */void solve() { // freopen("settling.in", "r", stdin); // freopen("settling.out", "w", stdout); cin >> n >> m; FOR(i, 1, m) { int u, v; cin >> u >> v; g[u].set(v); } update(); cout << sum << endl; int k; cin >> k; char op; int u, v; while (k--) { cin >> op >> u >> v; if (op == '?') { cout << (b[u][v] ? "YES" : "NO") << endl; } else if (op == '+') { g[u].set(v); update(); cout << sum << endl; } else { g[u].reset(v); update(); cout << sum << endl; } }}гҖҗbitset з»ҙжҠӨиҝһйҖҡжҖ§гҖ‘ ICPC2024 Asia EC Online (I) L. Bull FarmиҝҷйҮҢеҸӘиҜҙдёҖдёӢ std::bitset з»ҙжҠӨиҝһйҖҡжҖ§зҡ„ trickгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬йҰ–е…Ҳз”Ё G[i][j] иЎЁзӨәд»Һ iii еҮәеҸ‘еҸҜд»ҘеҲ°иҫҫ jjjгҖӮеҜ№дәҺж–°еҠ иҝӣжқҘзҡ„жҜҸдёҖжқЎиҫ№ (u,v)(u,v)(u,v)пјҢжҲ‘д»¬е…ҲзңӢзңӢд»Һ uuu еҮәеҸ‘пјҢз»ҸиҝҮ vvv иғҪеҲ°иҫҫеӨҡе°‘зӮ№ G[u] |= G[v]дҪҶжҳҜжҲ‘д»¬жІЎжңүиҖғиҷ‘жңүдәӣзӮ№ xxxпјҢдҪҝеҫ— xxx еҸҜд»Ҙз»ҸиҝҮ uuu еҲ°иҫҫ vvv еҶҚеҲ°иҫҫе…¶д»–зӮ№гҖӮжүҖд»ҘпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҶҚз»ҙжҠӨ H[i][j] иЎЁзӨә jjj еҸҜд»ҘеҲ°иҫҫ iiiпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ H[v] |= H[u]гҖӮдәҺжҳҜпјҢuвҶ’vвҶ’yu\to v\to yuвҶ’vвҶ’y е’Ң xвҶ’uвҶ’vx\to u\to vxвҶ’uвҶ’v еҸҲйғҪжҳҜйңҖиҰҒжӣҙж–°зҡ„пјҢзӣёеҪ“дәҺжҳҜдёҖжқЎж–°иҫ№ (x,v),(u,y)(x, v), (u, y)(x,v),(u,y)гҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ё std::queue и®°еҪ•иҰҒжӣҙж–°зҡ„зӮ№еҜ№Code1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829void work(int u, int v) { G[u].set(v); H[v].set(u); auto newE = G[u]; G[u] |= G[v]; newE ^= G[u]; while (1) { int w = newE._Find_first(); if (w < 1 or w > n) break; pushqueue(u, w); newE.flip(w); } newE = H[v]; H[v] |= H[u]; newE ^= H[v]; while (true) { int w = newE._Find_first(); if (w < 1 || w > n) { break; } pushqueue(w, v); newE.flip(w); } INFO(Queue);}

title: гҖҗеӯ—з¬ҰдёІгҖ‘еӯ—з¬ҰдёІзҡ„дёҖдәӣи§ЈйўҳжҖқи·Ҝ
content: еӯ—з¬ҰдёІзҡ„дёҖдәӣи§ЈйўҳжҖқи·Ҝ и®°еҪ•дёҖдәӣеӯ—з¬ҰдёІзҡ„и§ЈйўҳжҖқи·ҜпјҢиҝҷдәӣйўҳзҡ„ж ёеҝғжҖқз»ҙйғЁеҲҶе№¶йқһе…·дҪ“зҡ„зҹҘиҜҶзӮ№ CF1984DжҲ‘д»¬д»Һйқһ 'a' еӯ—з¬Ұе…ҘжүӢпјҡеҫҲжҳҫз„¶пјҢttt еә”иҜҘеҢ…еҗ«жүҖжңүйқһ 'a' еӯ—з¬ҰжүҚиғҪж»Ўи¶іиҰҒжұӮгҖӮйӮЈд№ҲжҲ‘д»¬е…ҲеҝҪз•ҘжүҖжңүзҡ„еүҚзјҖ 'a'пјҢз„¶еҗҺжһҡдёҫ ttt зҡ„й•ҝеәҰ kkkпјҢзңӢзңӢжҳҜеҗҰеҗҲжі•гҖӮеҰӮдҪ•еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҗҲжі•е‘ўпјҹеӣ дёәжҲ‘д»¬еҸӘиғҪеҝҪз•Ҙ 'a'пјҢеҜ№дәҺеҪ“еүҚзҡ„жҢҮеҗ‘ ttt ејҖеӨҙзҡ„жҢҮй’Ҳ pppпјҢжҲ‘д»¬е…Ҳи®©д»– +k+k+kпјҢз„¶еҗҺжҠҠ ppp жҢҮй’ҲзӣҙжҺҘз§»еҲ°дёӢдёҖдёӘйқһ 'a' еӯ—з¬ҰпјҢз„¶еҗҺеҲӨж–ӯ z[p] жҳҜеҗҰ вүҘk\ge kвүҘkпјҢеҸӘжңү z[] >= k жүҚиғҪиҜҙжҳҺз§»йҷӨжҺүдёҖдёӘ ttt е’ҢиӢҘе№ІдёӘ 'a' еү©дёӢзҡ„еӯҗдёІе’Ңеҗ« ttt зҡ„еҺҹдёІзҡ„жңҖеӨ§е…¬е…ұеүҚзјҖеӨ§дәҺзӯүдәҺ kkkпјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜиҜҙ ttt йҮҚеӨҚеҮәзҺ°дәҶгҖӮеҪ“дёҖдёӘ kkk еҗҲжі•д№ӢеҗҺпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҰӮдҪ•жұӮеҮәе…¶еҜ№зӯ”жЎҲзҡ„иҙЎзҢ®е‘ўпјҹеҜ№жҜҸдёҖдёӘ kkkпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘжҠҠеҺҹдёІ sss зңӢжҲҗз”ұеӨҡдёӘ вҲЈtвҲЈ=k|t| = kвҲЈtвҲЈ=k зҡ„еӯҗдёІз»„жҲҗпјҢе…¶дёӯиҝҳжҸ’е…ҘдәҶдёҖдәӣ 'a'гҖӮйӮЈд№ҲжҲ‘д»¬иғҪеҒҡзҡ„пјҢе°ұжҳҜеҜ№иҝҷдёӘ ttt ж·»еҠ еүҚзјҖ 'a'пјҢиғҪж·»еҠ еӨҡе°‘дёӘе‘ўпјҹе°ұжҳҜиҝҷдәӣеҲҶйҡ” 'a' зҡ„жңҖе°Ҹж•°йҮҸгҖӮиҙЎзҢ®е°ұжҳҜиҝҷдёӘжңҖе°Ҹж•°йҮҸ +1+1+1гҖӮCode1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071/* ============================ CONFIG BEGIN ============================ */// Z functionvector<int> exkmp(string &s) { int n = s.length(); vector<int> z(n, 0); // [l, r] = Z-box // l <= i for (int i = 1, l = 0, r = 0; i < n; i++) { if (i <= r && z[i - l] < r - i + 1) { z[i] = z[i - l]; } else { z[i] = max(0, r - i + 1); // i>r; as well as i<=r while (i + z[i] < n && s[z[i]] == s[i + z[i]]) z[i]++; } if (i + z[i] - 1 > r) l = i, r = i + z[i] - 1; } return z;}/* ============================= CONFIG END ============================= */void solve() { string a; cin >> a; if (*max_element(a.begin(), a.end()) == 'a') { cout << a.length() - 1 << endl; return; } // next non-'a' position int n = a.length(); vector<int> nota(n, n); for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (a[i] != 'a') nota[i] = i; else if (i < n - 1) nota[i] = nota[i + 1]; } // find first non-'a' int p; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) if (a[i] != 'a') { p = i; break; } string b = a.substr(p, n - p); auto z = exkmp(b); i64 ans = 0; auto check = [&](int len) { int ptr = p + len; int splitting_a = p; int ok = 1; while (ptr < n) { if (nota[ptr] == n) break; splitting_a = min(splitting_a, nota[ptr] - ptr); ptr = nota[ptr]; if (z[ptr - p] < len) { ok = 0; break; } ptr += len; } if (ok) ans += splitting_a + 1; }; for (int len = 1; len + p <= n; len++) { check(len); } cout << ans << endl;}гҖҗDP жұӮи§ЈдёӨдёӨеҗҺзјҖд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„ LCPгҖ‘CF1562E Rescue Niwen!иҝҷйҮҢеҸӘи®Іи§Ј DP жұӮи§ЈдёӨдёӨеҗҺзјҖд№Ӣй—ҙ LCP зҡ„жҖқи·ҜпјҢе…ідәҺеҗҺзјҖж•°з»„й…ҚеҗҲ DP жұӮи§Јзӯ”жЎҲзҡ„и®Іи§ЈиҜ·и§ҒиҝҷйҮҢ.жҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) и®Ўз®—дёӨдёӨеҗҺзјҖд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„ LCPгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬е…Ҳеӣәе®ҡ s[i]s[i]s[i] ејҖе§Ӣзҡ„еҗҺзјҖпјҢеҖ’еәҸжһҡдёҫ j<ij\lt ij<iпјҡLCP(s[i..n],s[j..n])={LCP(s[i+1..n],s[j+1..n])+1s[i]=s[j]0s[i]вү s[j]LCP(s[i..n],s[j..n])=\begin{cases}LCP(s[i+1..n], s[j+1..n])+1 &s[i]=s[j]\\0&s[i] e s[j]\end{cases}LCP(s[i..n],s[j..n])={LCP(s[i+1..n],s[j+1..n])+10вҖӢs[i]=s[j]s[i]оҖ =s[j]вҖӢиҫ№з•ҢжқЎд»¶и®ҫзҪ® LCP(s[n+1..n],s[n+1..n])=0LCP(s[n+1..n],s[n+1..n])=0LCP(s[n+1..n],s[n+1..n])=0

title: гҖҗеӯ—з¬ҰдёІгҖ‘еӯ—з¬ҰдёІе“ҲеёҢ
content: еӯ—з¬ҰдёІе“ҲеёҢ дҫӢйўҳ гҖҗдәҢеҲҶ+е“ҲеёҢгҖ‘CF1968G1дј йҖҒй—ЁжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘеҸ‘зҺ°иҝҷд№ҲдёҖд»¶дәӢпјҢеҰӮжһң uuu жҳҜ vvv зҡ„еүҚзјҖпјҢйӮЈд№ҲжүҖжңү vvv еҮәзҺ°зҡ„дҪҚзҪ®д№ҹдёҖе®ҡеҮәзҺ°дәҶ uuuпјҢиҝҷд»¶дәӢжҸҗзӨәжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙ дәҢеҲҶ пјҡеҰӮжһңдёҖдёӘй•ҝеәҰ LLL жҳҜеҗҲжі•зҡ„пјҢйӮЈд№ҲиҖғиҷ‘д»–зҡ„еүҚзјҖд№ҹдёҖе®ҡжҳҜеҗҲжі•зҡ„гҖӮе№¶дё”жіЁж„ҸеҲ°пјҢеҰӮжһңй•ҝеәҰдёә LLL еҗҲжі•пјҢйӮЈд№ҲжңҖејҖеӨҙзҡ„ LLL дёӘеӯ—з¬Ұ дёҖе®ҡеұһдәҺеҲҶеүІеҮәжқҘзҡ„з¬¬дёҖдёӘеӯҗдёІпјҢдёҖе®ҡжҳҜе…¬е…ұзҡ„еүҚзјҖгҖӮжүҖд»ҘпјҢжҲ‘д»¬дәҢеҲҶй•ҝеәҰпјҢз”Ёеӯ—з¬ҰдёІе“ҲеёҢи®Ўз®— a1вҖҰaLa_1\dots a_La1вҖӢвҖҰaLвҖӢ зҡ„е“ҲеёҢеҖјеҶҚжӢҝеҲ°еҺҹдёІйҮҢеҢ№й…ҚдёӘж•°пјҢеҰӮжһңдёӘж•° вүҘk\ge kвүҘkпјҢиҜҙжҳҺеҗҲжі•пјҢе°қиҜ•жӣҙеӨ§зҡ„ LLLпјӣеҗҰеҲҷзј©е°ҸжҗңзҙўиҢғеӣҙгҖӮжіЁж„ҸпјҢеҢ№й…Қзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷеҰӮжһңеҢ№й…ҚжҲҗеҠҹпјҢдёӢж ҮиҰҒ +=L+=L+=LпјҢи·іиҝҮеҢ№й…ҚеҲ°зҡ„еӯҗдёІгҖӮж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰ O(nlogвҒЎn)O(n\log n)O(nlogn)гҖӮи®°еҪ•Code123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172namespace StringHash { std::mt19937 rng(std::chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count()); bool isprime(int n) { if (n <= 1) return false; for (int i = 2; i * i <= n; i++) if (n % i == 0) return false; return true; } int findPrime(int n) { while (!isprime(n)) n++; return n; } template <int N> struct StringHash { using cluster = array<int, N>; static cluster mod; static cluster base; vector<cluster> p, h; StringHash() = default; StringHash(const string &s) { int n = s.size(); p.resize(n); h.resize(n); fill(p[0].begin(), p[0].end(), 1); fill(h[0].begin(), h[0].end(), 1); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) for (int j = 0; j < N; j++) { p[i][j] = 1ll * (i == 0 ? 1ll : p[i - 1][j]) * base[j] % mod[j]; h[i][j] = (1ll * (i == 0 ? 0ll : h[i - 1][j]) * base[j] + s[i]) % mod[j]; } } cluster query(int l, int r) { cluster ans{}; if (l > r) return {0, 0}; for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) { ans[i] = (h[r][i] - 1ll * (l == 0 ? 0ll : h[l - 1][i]) * (r - l + 1 == 0 ? 1ll : p[r - l][i]) % mod[i] + mod[i]) % mod[i]; } return ans; } }; constexpr int HN = 2; template <> array<int, 2> StringHash<HN>::mod = {findPrime(rng() % 900000000 + 100000000), findPrime(rng() % 900000000 + 100000000)}; template <> array<int, 2> StringHash<HN>::base{13331, 131};}; // namespace StringHashusing Hashing = StringHash::StringHash<2>; void solve() { int n, k; string a; cin >> n >> k >> k; cin >> a; Hashing sh(a); int l = 1, r = n + 1; while (l < r) { int mid = l + ((r - l) >> 1); if (mid == 0) break; int cnt{0}; auto base = sh.query(0, mid - 1); for (int i = 0; i < n - mid + 1;) { if (sh.query(i, i + mid - 1) == base) cnt++, i += mid; else i++; } if (cnt >= k) l = mid + 1; else r = mid; } cout << l - 1 << endl;}

title: гҖҗеӯ—з¬ҰдёІгҖ‘еҗҺзјҖж•°з»„
content: еҗҺзјҖж•°з»„ зәҝжҖ§еҜ№ж•°ж—¶й—ҙжһ„йҖ жі• еҹәж•°жҺ’еәҸ+еҖҚеўһжі•12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576/** * @brief Suffix Array. 1-indexed. `sa` and `rk` all 1-indexed. */namespace SA { constexpr int MAXN = 1e5 + 5; constexpr int MAXM = 256; string s; int n; int m; vector<int> sa, rk, oldrk, id, key1, cnt; // Total possible charset vector<int> height; void init() { sa.assign(n + 1, 0); rk.assign(n + 1, 0); oldrk.assign(n << 1, 0); id.assign(n + 1, 0); key1.assign(n + 1, 0); height.assign(n + 1, 0); cnt.assign(max(n, m) + 1, 0); } void set(string original) { n = original.length(); m = MAXM; s = "$" + original; init(); } bool cmp(int x, int y, int w) { return oldrk[x] == oldrk[y] && oldrk[x + w] == oldrk[y + w]; } // O(nlog n) void calcSA() { for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) ++cnt[rk[i] = s[i]]; for (int i = 1; i <= m; ++i) cnt[i] += cnt[i - 1]; for (int i = n; i >= 1; --i) sa[cnt[rk[i]]--] = i; for (int w = 1, i, p;; w <<= 1, m = p) { for (p = 0, i = n; i > n - w; --i) id[++p] = i; for (i = 1; i <= n; ++i) if (sa[i] > w) id[++p] = sa[i] - w; // Bucket Sort. fill(cnt.begin(), cnt.end(), 0); for (i = 1; i <= n; ++i) ++cnt[key1[i] = rk[id[i]]]; for (i = 1; i <= m; ++i) cnt[i] += cnt[i - 1]; for (i = n; i >= 1; --i) sa[cnt[key1[i]]--] = id[i]; copy(rk.begin(), rk.end(), oldrk.begin()); for (p = 0, i = 1; i <= n; ++i) rk[sa[i]] = cmp(sa[i], sa[i - 1], w) ? p : ++p; if (p == n) { // rk[] is now distinct, exit break; } } } auto getSA() { calcSA(); return sa; } void calcHeight() { for (int i = 1, k = 0; i <= n; ++i) { if (rk[i] == 0) continue; if (k) --k; while (s[i + k] == s[sa[rk[i] - 1] + k]) ++k; height[rk[i]] = k; } } auto getHeight() { calcHeight(); return height; }}; // namespace SA еә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜ дҫӢйўҳ P4051 еӯ—з¬ҰеҠ еҜҶеңЁзҺҜдёҠеҸ–еӯҗеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢжғіеҲ°жҠҠзҺҜжӢҶжҲҗй“ҫпјҲжҠҠиҮӘе·ұеӨҚеҲ¶дёҖд»ҪжӢјеҲ°жң«е°ҫпјүгҖӮеӯҗдёІзҡ„жҺ’еәҸ вҹ№ \impliesвҹ№ еҗҺзјҖж•°з»„пјҹжІЎй”ҷпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙз”ЁеҗҺзјҖж•°з»„еҜ№еҗҺзјҖиҝӣиЎҢжҺ’еәҸпјҢиҖҢеҜ№еҗҺзјҖжҺ’еәҸпјҢе®һйҷ…дёҠд№ҹе°ұжҳҜеҜ№еҫӘзҺҜеӯҗдёІзҡ„жҺ’еәҸгҖӮеӣ дёәй•ҝеәҰеӨ§дәҺ len(s)len(s)len(s) зҡ„еҗҺзјҖпјҢйҷӨдәҶеҢ…еҗ«еҫӘзҺҜеӯҗдёІд»ҘеӨ–пјҢеҸӘеҢ…еҗ«иҝҷдёӘеҗҺзјҖзҡ„еүҚзјҖгҖӮдҫӢеҰӮ abcd\text{abcd}abcdпјҢжӢјжҺҘе®ҢжҳҜ abcdabcd\text{abcdabcd}abcdabcdпјҢиҖғиҷ‘ cd\text{cd}cd ејҖе§Ӣзҡ„еҫӘзҺҜеӯҗдёІ cdab\text{cdab}cdabпјҢе…¶ејҖе§Ӣзҡ„еҗҺзјҖжҳҜ cdabcd\text{cdabcd}cdabcdпјҢеӨҡеҮәжқҘзҡ„е°ҫе·ҙ cd\text{cd}cd жҒ°е·§е°ұжҳҜ cdabcd\text{cdabcd}cdabcd зҡ„еүҚзјҖпјҢеӣ жӯӨжҳҜжІЎжңүеҪұе“Қзҡ„гҖӮCodeгҖҗеҗҺзјҖж•°з»„ + DPгҖ‘CF1562E Rescue Niwenеӣ дёәжҳҜеӯ—е…ёеәҸпјҢжҳҫз„¶жңү s[i]<s[i..i+1]<s[i..i+2]<s[i..n]s[i]<s[i..i+1]<s[i..i+2]<s[i..n]s[i]<s[i..i+1]<s[i..i+2]<s[i..n]пјҢе№¶дё”еҸҜд»ҘиҜҒжҳҺзҡ„жҳҜпјҢеҰӮжһң s[l..r]s[l..r]s[l..r] еҮәзҺ°еңЁжңҖдјҳи§ЈйҮҢпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ s[l..n]s[l..n]s[l..n] д№ҹдёҖе®ҡзҙ§и·ҹе…¶еҗҺгҖӮжүҖд»ҘпјҢжҲ‘д»¬зҡ„д»»еҠЎе°ұеҸҳжҲҗдәҶпјҢе…ҲжҢ‘еҮәдёҘеўһзҡ„еҗҺзјҖпјҢз„¶еҗҺжЈҖжҹҘиҝҷдәӣеҗҺзјҖд№Ӣй—ҙиғҪж”ҫеӨҡе°‘еӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҲйўҳи§ЈиҜҙжі•пјҡеҫ—еҲ°дёҖдёӘеҗҺзјҖжҺҘеҲ°еҸҰдёҖдёӘеҗҺзјҖеүҚйқўж—¶з¬¬дёҖдёӘеүҚзјҖзҡ„й•ҝеәҰжҳҜеӨҡе°‘дәҶпјүгҖӮз»“еҗҲиҝҷйҮҢз»ҷеҮәзҡ„ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) жұӮи§Ј LCP зҡ„ DP з®—жі•пјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘеңЁ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) зҡ„ж—¶й—ҙеҶ… DP и®Ўз®—гҖӮи®ҫ dp[i]dp[i]dp[i] иЎЁзӨәд»Ҙз¬¬ iii дёӘеҗҺзјҖдёәз»“е°ҫж—¶иғҪйҖүеҮәжқҘзҡ„жңҖеӨ§еӯҗдёІж•°гҖӮйҰ–е…ҲйҒҚеҺҶ j<ij\lt ij<iпјҢз”ЁеҗҺзјҖж•°з»„йў„еӨ„зҗҶеҗҺзјҖзҡ„еӨ§е°Ҹе…ізі»пјҢиҝҮж»ӨжҺү rk[j]>rk[i]rk[j]>rk[i]rk[j]>rk[i] зҡ„еҗҺзјҖпјӣеҜ№еү©дёӢзҡ„еҗҺзјҖпјҢи®Ўз®— dpi=maxвҒЎ(dpj+len(suffixi)вҲ’LCP(i,j))dp_i=\max \Big(dp_j+len(suffix_i)-LCP(i,j)\Big)dpiвҖӢ=max(dpjвҖӢ+len(suffixiвҖӢ)вҲ’LCP(i,j)) еҚіеҸҜгҖӮжңҖеҗҺиҫ“еҮә maxвҒЎdpi\max dp_imaxdpiвҖӢCode12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031void solve() { cin >> n; cin >> s; SA::set(s); SA::calcSA(); using SA::rk; s = "$" + s; vector<int> dp(n + 1, 0); vector<vector<int>> lcp(n + 2, vector<int>(n + 2, 0)); for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) { for (int j = i - 1; j >= 1; j--) { lcp[i][j] = (s[i] == s[j] ? 1 + lcp[i + 1][j + 1] : 0); } } dp[1] = n; // debug(rk); for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { int mx = 0; for (int j = 1; j < i; j++) { if (rk[j] >= rk[i]) continue; auto len = n - i + 1; mx = max(mx, dp[j] + len - lcp[i][j]); // cerr << std::format("{}, {} = {} ", j, i, lcp); } dp[i] = mx == 0 ? n - i + 1 : mx; } // debug(dp); cout << *max_element(dp.begin(), dp.end()) << endl;}

title: е°ҸеҘ—и·ҜжҖ»з»“

2, 2\oplus 1, 1\oplus 5,\dots1вҠ•5,5вҠ•3,3вҠ•7,7вҠ•2,2вҠ•1,1вҠ•5,вҖҰиҝҷж ·ејӮжҲ–д№ӢеҗҺиӢҘдёә 000пјҢеҲҷеҮәзҺ° kkk зҡ„еҖҚж•°ж¬ЎгҖӮзӨәдҫӢд»Јз Ғ12345678910111213141516std::mt19937_64 rng(std::chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count());for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { auto &v = hsh[a[i]]; if (v.empty()) v.push_back(rng()); auto value = v.back(); if (v.size() < k) { v.push_back(rng()); value ^= v.back(); } else { int p = cnt[a[i]] % k; value = v[p] ^ v[(p + 1) % k]; } cnt[a[i]]++; S[i] = S[i - 1] ^ value; // жұӮеүҚзјҖе’Ң} дјҳеҢ–еӨҚжқӮеәҰз“¶йўҲдёәйҮҚзҪ®ејҖж—¶й—ҙжҲіж•°з»„ vis[]гҖӮеҪ“ vis[?] != stamp ж—¶жүҚжӣҙж–°пјҢеҗҰеҲҷдёҚжӣҙж–°гҖӮ дёӯдҪҚж•°иҪ¬еҢ–дёәеүҚзјҖе’ҢйҖҡеёёе’ҢдәҢеҲҶзӯ”жЎҲз»“еҗҲгҖӮдәҢеҲҶжһҡдёҫеҸҜиғҪзҡ„дёӯдҪҚж•° KKKпјҢз„¶еҗҺ >K\gt K>K =1пјҢеҗҰеҲҷ =0пјҢжұӮеүҚзјҖе’ҢгҖӮеҰӮжһң sum>n/2sum>n/2sum>n/2 иҜҙжҳҺ KKK е°ҸдәҺзңҹе®һзҡ„дёӯдҪҚж•°гҖӮгҖҗдәҢз»ҙеүҚзјҖе’Ң + дәҢеҲҶгҖ‘2024 ICPC Asia EC зҪ‘з»ңиөӣ (1)пјҡPermutation Counting 4иҝҷйўҳзҡ„жҖқз»ҙй“ҫпјҡжҖқз»ҙеӣҫCode1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253#define FOR(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i <= b; i++)#define ROF(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i >= b; i--)/* ============================ CONFIG BEGIN ============================ */constexpr int N = 2050;int b[N][N], a[N], sb[N][N], c;int n, totmid;int D[N], t[N];int check(int k) { FOR(i, 1, n) t[i] = t[i - 1] + (a[i] > k); // еүҚзјҖе’ҢпјҢжңүеӨҡе°‘ж•°еӨ§дәҺ k FOR(l, 1, n) { FOR(r, l, n) { int cnt = t[r] - t[l - 1], len = r - l + 1; b[l][r] = (len - cnt) < (len + 1) / 2; } } FOR(l, 1, n) { FOR(r, 1, n) { sb[l][r] = b[l][r] + sb[l - 1][r] + sb[l][r - 1] - sb[l - 1][r - 1]; } } int cnt = 0; FOR(l, 1, n) { FOR(r, l, n) { int len = r - l + 1; c = sb[r][r] + sb[l - 1][l - 1] - sb[l - 1][r] - sb[r][l - 1]; int half = (len + 1) * len / 2; if (half - c >= (half + 1) / 2) cnt++; } } return cnt >= totmid;}/* ============================= CONFIG END ============================= */void solve() { cin >> n; totmid = (n * (n + 1) / 2 + 1) / 2; FOR(i, 1, n) { cin >> a[i], D[i] = a[i]; } sort(D + 1, D + 1 + n); int l = 1, r = n; while (l < r) { int mid = l + ((r - l) >> 1); auto res = check(D[mid]); if (res) r = mid; else l = mid + 1; } cout << D[l] << endl;}

(rchild->is_null() ? get() : s_op(get(), rchild->m_info)) : (rchild->is_null() ? s_op(lchild->m_info, get()) : s_op(s_op(lchild->m_info, get()), rchild->m_info)); } }; }; template <typename Tp, typename Operation, typename Compare> template <typename Node> Operation CustomNodeWrapper<Tp, Operation, Compare>::type<Node>::s_op; template <typename Tp, typename ModifyType, typename Operation, typename Mapping, typename Composition, bool InitClearLazy> struct CustomLazyNodeWrapper { template <typename Node> struct type { using key_type = Tp; static Operation s_op; static Mapping s_map; static Composition s_com; static ModifyType s_default_modify; key_type m_key, m_info; ModifyType m_modify; void set(const key_type &key) { m_key = key; if constexpr (InitClearLazy) m_modify = s_default_modify; } const key_type &get() const { return m_key; } void modify(const ModifyType &modify) { m_key = s_map(modify, m_key, 1); m_info = s_map(modify, m_info, ((Node *)this)->m_size); m_modify = s_com(modify, m_modify); } void pushup(Node *lchild, Node *rchild) { m_info = lchild->is_null() ? (rchild->is_null() ? get() : s_op(get(), rchild->m_info)) : (rchild->is_null() ? s_op(lchild->m_info, get()) : s_op(s_op(lchild->m_info, get()), rchild->m_info)); } void pushdown(Node *lchild, Node *rchild) { if (!lchild->is_null()) lchild->modify(m_modify); if (!rchild->is_null()) rchild->modify(m_modify); m_modify = s_default_modify; }; }; }; template <typename Tp, typename ModifyType, typename Operation, typename Mapping, typename Composition, bool InitClearLazy> template <typename Node> Operation CustomLazyNodeWrapper<Tp, ModifyType, Operation, Mapping, Composition, InitClearLazy>::type<Node>::s_op; template <typename Tp, typename ModifyType, typename Operation, typename Mapping, typename Composition, bool InitClearLazy> template <typename Node> Mapping CustomLazyNodeWrapper<Tp, ModifyType, Operation, Mapping, Composition, InitClearLazy>::type<Node>::s_map; template <typename Tp, typename ModifyType, typename Operation, typename Mapping, typename Composition, bool InitClearLazy> template <typename Node> Composition CustomLazyNodeWrapper<Tp, ModifyType, Operation, Mapping, Composition, InitClearLazy>::type<Node>::s_com; template <typename Tp, typename ModifyType, typename Operation, typename Mapping, typename Composition, bool InitClearLazy> template <typename Node> ModifyType CustomLazyNodeWrapper<Tp, ModifyType, Operation, Mapping, Composition, InitClearLazy>::type<Node>::s_default_modify;#ifdef __cpp_lib_void_t template <typename... Tp> using void_t = std::void_t<Tp...>;#else template <typename... Tp> struct make_void { using type = void; }; template <typename... Tp> using void_t = typename make_void<Tp...>::type;#endif template <typename Tp, typename NodePtr, typename = void> struct Has_pushup : std::false_type {}; template <typename Tp, typename NodePtr> struct Has_pushup<Tp, NodePtr, void_t<decltype(std::declval<Tp>().pushup(std::declval<NodePtr>(), std::declval<NodePtr>()))>> : std::true_type {}; template <typename Tp, typename NodePtr, typename = void> struct Has_pushdown : std::false_type {}; template <typename Tp, typename NodePtr> struct Has_pushdown<Tp, NodePtr, void_t<decltype(std::declval<Tp>().pushdown(std::declval<NodePtr>(), std::declval<NodePtr>()))>> : std::true_type {}; template <typename Tp, typename Fp, typename = void> struct Has_comp : std::false_type {}; template <typename Tp, typename Fp> struct Has_comp<Tp, Fp, void_t<decltype(Tp::comp(std::declval<Fp>(), std::declval<Fp>()))>> : std::true_type {}; template <typename Ostream, typename Tp, typename = void> struct Has_ostream : std::false_type {}; template <typename Ostream, typename Tp> struct Has_ostream<Ostream, Tp, void_t<decltype(std::declval<Ostream>() << std::declval<Tp>())>> : std::true_type {}; template <template <typename> typename NodeWrapper, size_type MAX_NODE = 1 << 20> struct Multiset { struct node : NodeWrapper<node> { priority_type m_prior; size_type m_size, m_lchild, m_rchild; bool is_null() const { return this == s_buffer; } node *lchild() const { return s_buffer + m_lchild; } node *rchild() const { return s_buffer + m_rchild; } template <typename Ostream> friend Ostream &operator<<(Ostream &out, const node &x) { if constexpr (Has_ostream<Ostream &, NodeWrapper<node>>::value) return out << NodeWrapper<node>(x); else return out << x.get(); } }; using key_type = typename node::key_type; using tree_type = Multiset<NodeWrapper, MAX_NODE>; struct ValueLessJudger { const key_type &m_key; ValueLessJudger(const key_type &key) : m_key(key) {} bool operator()(size_type x) const { return _comp(m_key, s_buffer[x].get()); } }; struct ValueLessEqualJudger { const key_type &m_key; ValueLessEqualJudger(const key_type &key) : m_key(key) {} bool operator()(size_type x) const { return !_comp(s_buffer[x].get(), m_key); } }; struct RankJudger { size_type m_rank; RankJudger(size_type k) : m_rank(k) {} bool operator()(size_type x) { if (m_rank <= s_buffer[x].lchild()->m_size) return true; m_rank -= s_buffer[x].lchild()->m_size + 1; return false; } }; template <typename SumType> struct SumJudger { SumType m_sum, m_ceil; SumJudger(SumType ceil) : m_sum(), m_ceil(ceil) {} bool try_lchild(node *x) { SumType tmp = x->lchild()->m_info + m_sum; if (tmp > m_ceil) return false; return m_sum = tmp, true; } bool try_rchild(node *x) { SumType tmp = m_sum + x->rchild()->m_info; if (tmp > m_ceil) return false; return m_sum = tmp, true; } bool try_mid(node *x) { SumType tmp = m_sum + x->get(); if (tmp > m_ceil) return false; return m_sum = tmp, true; } }; static node s_buffer[MAX_NODE]; static size_type s_use_count; size_type m_root{}; template <typename Modify = Ignore> static size_type _create(const key_type &key, Modify &&modify = Modify()) { s_buffer[s_use_count].set(key); s_buffer[s_use_count].m_prior = treap_rand(); s_buffer[s_use_count].m_size = 1; if constexpr (!std::is_same<typename std::decay<Modify>::type, Ignore>::value) modify(s_buffer + s_use_count); return s_use_count++; } static bool _comp(const key_type &x, const key_type &y) { if constexpr (Has_comp<node, key_type>::value) return node::comp(x, y); else return x < y; } static void _update_size(size_type x) { s_buffer[x].m_size = s_buffer[x].lchild()->m_size + s_buffer[x].rchild()->m_size + 1; } static void _pushdown(size_type x) { if constexpr (Has_pushdown<node, node *>::value) s_buffer[x].pushdown(s_buffer[x].lchild(), s_buffer[x].rchild()); } static void _pushup(size_type x) { if constexpr (Has_pushup<node, node *>::value) s_buffer[x].pushup(s_buffer[x].lchild(), s_buffer[x].rchild()); } template <typename Judger> static void _split(size_type rt, size_type *x, size_type *y, Judger &&judger) { if (!rt) return (void)(*x = *y = 0); _pushdown(rt); if (judger(rt)) *y = rt, _split(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, x, &s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, judger); else *x = rt, _split(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, &s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, y, judger); _update_size(rt); _pushup(rt); } static void _join(size_type *rt, size_type x, size_type y) { if (!x || !y) return (void)(*rt = x | y); if (s_buffer[x].m_prior > s_buffer[y].m_prior) { _pushdown(x); _join(&s_buffer[ *rt = x].m_rchild, s_buffer[x].m_rchild, y); } else { _pushdown(y); _join(&s_buffer[ *rt = y].m_lchild, x, s_buffer[y].m_lchild); } _update_size(*rt); _pushup(*rt); } template <typename Func> static void _merge(size_type *rt, size_type x, size_type y, Func func) { if (!x || !y) return (void)(*rt = x | y); if (s_buffer[x].m_prior < s_buffer[y].m_prior) std::swap(x, y); _pushdown(x); size_type a, b, c; _split(y, &a, &b, ValueLessEqualJudger(s_buffer[x].get())); _split(b, &b, &c, ValueLessJudger(s_buffer[x].get())); _merge(&s_buffer[x].m_lchild, s_buffer[x].m_lchild, a, func); _merge(&s_buffer[x].m_rchild, s_buffer[x].m_rchild, c, func); if constexpr (std::is_same<Func, Ignore>::value) _join(&s_buffer[x].m_rchild, b, s_buffer[x].m_rchild); else if (b) func(s_buffer + x, s_buffer + b); _update_size(*rt = x); _pushup(*rt); } template <typename Judger> static void _insert(size_type *rt, size_type x, Judger &&judger) { _pushdown(*rt); if (s_buffer[x].m_prior < s_buffer[*rt].m_prior) { ++s_buffer[*rt].m_size; if (judger(*rt)) _insert(&s_buffer[*rt].m_lchild, x, judger); else _insert(&s_buffer[*rt].m_rchild, x, judger); } else { _split(*rt, &s_buffer[x].m_lchild, &s_buffer[x].m_rchild, judger); _update_size(*rt = x); } _pushup(*rt); } static bool _erase_by_key(size_type *rt, const key_type &key) { if (!*rt) return false; _pushdown(*rt); if (_comp(key, s_buffer[*rt].get())) { if (_erase_by_key(&s_buffer[*rt].m_lchild, key)) { --s_buffer[*rt].m_size, _pushup(*rt); return true; } return false; } else if (_comp(s_buffer[*rt].get(), key)) { if (_erase_by_key(&s_buffer[*rt].m_rchild, key)) { --s_buffer[*rt].m_size, _pushup(*rt); return true; } return false; } else { _join(rt, s_buffer[*rt].m_lchild, s_buffer[*rt].m_rchild); return true; } } static void _erase_by_rank(size_type *rt, size_type k) { _pushdown(*rt); if (k != s_buffer[*rt].lchild()->m_size) { --s_buffer[*rt].m_size; if (k <= s_buffer[*rt].lchild()->m_size) _erase_by_rank(&s_buffer[*rt].m_lchild, k); else _erase_by_rank(&s_buffer[*rt].m_rchild, k - s_buffer[*rt].lchild()->m_size - 1); _pushup(*rt); } else _join(rt, s_buffer[*rt].m_lchild, s_buffer[*rt].m_rchild); } template <typename Modify> static bool _modify_by_key(size_type rt, const key_type &key, Modify &&modify) { bool res = false; if (!rt) return res; _pushdown(rt); if (_comp(s_buffer[rt].get(), key)) res = _modify_by_key(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, key, modify); else if (_comp(key, s_buffer[rt].get())) res = _modify_by_key(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, key, modify); else modify(s_buffer + rt), res = true; if (res) _pushup(rt); return res; } template <typename Modify> static void _modify_by_rank(size_type rt, size_type k, Modify &&modify) { _pushdown(rt); if (k < s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size) _modify_by_rank(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, k, modify); else if (k -= s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size) _modify_by_rank(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, k - 1, modify); else modify(s_buffer + rt); _pushup(rt); } static size_type _kth(size_type rt, size_type k) { _pushdown(rt); if (k < s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size) return _kth(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, k); if (k -= s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size) return _kth(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, k - 1); return rt; } template <typename Judge> static size_type _min_left(size_type rt, Judge &&judge) { if (!rt) return 0; _pushdown(rt); if (!judge.try_rchild(s_buffer + rt)) return s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size + 1 + _min_left(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, judge); if (!judge.try_mid(s_buffer + rt)) return s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size + 1; return _min_left(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, judge); } template <typename Judge> static size_type _max_right(size_type rt, Judge &&judge) { if (!rt) return -1; _pushdown(rt); if (!judge.try_lchild(s_buffer + rt)) return _max_right(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, judge); if (!judge.try_mid(s_buffer + rt)) return s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size - 1; return s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size + 1 + _max_right(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, judge); } static size_type _rank(size_type rt, const key_type &key) { if (!rt) return 0; _pushdown(rt); if (!_comp(s_buffer[rt].get(), key)) return _rank(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, key); return s_buffer[rt].lchild()->m_size + 1 + _rank(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, key); } static size_type _smaller_bound(size_type rt, const key_type &key) { if (!rt) return 0; _pushdown(rt); if (!_comp(s_buffer[rt].get(), key)) return _smaller_bound(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, key); size_type res = _smaller_bound(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, key); return res ? res : rt; } static size_type _lower_bound(size_type rt, const key_type &key) { if (!rt) return 0; _pushdown(rt); if (_comp(s_buffer[rt].get(), key)) return _lower_bound(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, key); size_type res = _lower_bound(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, key); return res ? res : rt; } static size_type _upper_bound(size_type rt, const key_type &key) { if (!rt) return 0; _pushdown(rt); if (!_comp(key, s_buffer[rt].get())) return _upper_bound(s_buffer[rt].m_rchild, key); size_type res = _upper_bound(s_buffer[rt].m_lchild, key); return res ? res : rt; } void clear() { m_root = 0; } template <typename Modify = Ignore> void insert_by_key(const key_type &key, Modify &&modify = Modify()) { _insert(&m_root, _create(key, modify), ValueLessJudger(key)); } template <typename Modify = Ignore> void insert_by_rank(const key_type &key, size_type k, Modify &&modify = Modify()) { _insert(&m_root, _create(key, modify), RankJudger(k)); } bool erase_by_key(const key_type &key) { return _erase_by_key(&m_root, key); } void erase_by_rank(size_type k) { _erase_by_rank(&m_root, k); } template <typename Modify> bool modify_by_key(const key_type &key, Modify &&modify) { return _modify_by_key(m_root, key, modify); } template <typename Modify> void modify_by_rank(size_type k, Modify &&modify) { _modify_by_rank(m_root, k, modify); } tree_type split_by_key(const key_type &key) { tree_type other; _split(m_root, &m_root, &other.m_root, ValueLessEqualJudger(key)); return other; } tree_type split_by_rank(size_type k) { tree_type other; _split(m_root, &m_root, &other.m_root, RankJudger(k)); return other; } void join(tree_type other) { _join(&m_root, m_root, other.m_root); } template <typename Func = Ignore> void merge(tree_type other, Func func = Func()) { _merge(&m_root, m_root, other.m_root, func); } node *root() const { return s_buffer + m_root; } size_type size() const { return s_buffer[m_root].m_size; } node *kth(size_type k) const { return s_buffer + _kth(m_root, k); } template <typename Judger> size_type min_left(size_type right, Judger &&judger) { tree_type other = split_by_rank(right + 1); size_type res = _min_left(m_root, judger); join(other); return res; } template <typename Judger> size_type max_right(size_type left, Judger &&judger) { tree_type other = split_by_rank(left); size_type res = _max_right(other.m_root, judger); join(other); return left + res; } size_type rank(const key_type &key) const { return _rank(m_root, key); } node *smaller_bound(const key_type &key) const { return s_buffer + _smaller_bound(m_root, key); } node *lower_bound(const key_type &key) const { return s_buffer + _lower_bound(m_root, key); } node *upper_bound(const key_type &key) const { return s_buffer + _upper_bound(m_root, key); } }; template <typename Ostream, template <typename> typename NodeWrapper, size_type MAX_NODE> Ostream &operator<<(Ostream &out, const Multiset<NodeWrapper, MAX_NODE> &x) { out << "{"; for (size_type i = 0; i < x.size(); i++) { if (i) out << ", "; out << *x.kth(i); } return out << "}"; } template <template <typename> typename NodeWrapper, size_type MAX_NODE> typename Multiset<NodeWrapper, MAX_NODE>::node Multiset<NodeWrapper, MAX_NODE>::s_buffer[MAX_NODE]; template <template <typename> typename NodeWrapper, size_type MAX_NODE> size_type Multiset<NodeWrapper, MAX_NODE>::s_use_count = 1; } // namespace FHQ template <typename Tp, typename Compare = std::less<Tp>, FHQ::size_type MAX_NODE = 1 << 20, typename Operation, typename TreeType = FHQ::Multiset<FHQ::CustomNodeWrapper<Tp, Operation, Compare>::template type, MAX_NODE>> auto make_FHQTreap(Operation op) -> TreeType { return TreeType(); } template <typename Tp, typename Compare = std::less<Tp>, FHQ::size_type MAX_NODE = 1 << 20, typename TreeType = FHQ::Multiset<FHQ::CustomNodeWrapper<Tp, const Tp &(*)(const Tp &, const Tp &), Compare>::template type, MAX_NODE>> auto make_FHQTreap(const Tp &(*op)(const Tp &, const Tp &)) -> TreeType { return TreeType::node::s_op = op, TreeType(); } template <typename Tp, typename Compare = std::less<Tp>, FHQ::size_type MAX_NODE = 1 << 20, typename TreeType = FHQ::Multiset<FHQ::CustomNodeWrapper<Tp, Tp (*)(Tp, Tp), Compare>::template type, MAX_NODE>> auto make_FHQTreap(Tp (*op)(Tp, Tp)) -> TreeType { return TreeType::node::s_op = op, TreeType(); } template <typename Tp, typename ModifyType, bool InitClearLazy, typename Compare = std::less<Tp>, FHQ::size_type MAX_NODE = 1 << 20, typename Operation, typename Mapping, typename Composition, typename TreeType = FHQ::Multiset<FHQ::CustomLazyNodeWrapper<Tp, ModifyType, Operation, Mapping, Composition, InitClearLazy>::template type, MAX_NODE>> auto make_lazy_FHQTreap(Operation op, Mapping map, Composition com, const ModifyType &default_modify = ModifyType()) -> TreeType { return TreeType::node::s_default_modify = default_modify, TreeType(); } template <typename Tp, typename Compare = std::less<Tp>, FHQ::size_type MAX_NODE = 1 << 20> using FHQTreap = FHQ::Multiset<FHQ::BaseNodeWrapper<Tp, Compare>::template type, MAX_NODE>;} // namespace Treap дҪҝз”ЁиҜҙжҳҺ иҝҷдёӘжқҝеӯҗзҡ„е…ғзҙ йЎәеәҸжҳҜд»Һе°ҸеҲ°еӨ§гҖӮ 1. зұ»еһӢи®ҫе®ҡ (е»әз«Ӣе№іиЎЎж ‘) size_type Default: uint32_t ж ‘зҡ„еӨ§е°ҸгҖҒиҠӮзӮ№зј–еҸ·зҡ„ж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢ priority_type Default: uint32_t иҠӮзӮ№зҡ„йҡҸжңәжқғйҮҚеҖј template <typename> typename NodeWrapper иҠӮзӮ№зҡ„зұ»еһӢ MAX_NODE (size_type) Default: 1 << 20 жңҖеӨ§зҡ„иҠӮзӮ№ж•°йҮҸ дҫӢеӯҗпјҡе»әз«ӢдёҖжЈөе№іиЎЎж ‘1Treap::FHQTreap<i64> treap; 2. жЁЎжқҝж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„ж“ҚдҪң 2.1 жҸ’е…Ҙ .insert_by_rank(const key_type &key, size_type k, Modify &&modify) -> void ж №жҚ®дҪҚзҪ®жҸ’е…Ҙе…ғзҙ  еҸӮж•°иҜҙжҳҺпјҡ keyпјҡиҰҒжҸ’е…Ҙзҡ„еҖј k: жҸ’е…ҘеҗҺпјҢжҳҜз¬¬еҮ дёӘж•°пјҹдёӢж Үдёә [0, size()] modify: еҢҝеҗҚеҮҪж•°пјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҜ№иҝҷдёӘж–°жҸ’е…Ҙзҡ„иҠӮзӮ№иҝӣиЎҢдҝ®ж”№гҖҒеҲқе§ӢеҢ–гҖӮ ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰпјҡO(logвҒЎn)O(\log n)O(logn) .insert_by_key(const key_type &key, Modify &&modify) -> void ж №жҚ®еҖјжҸ’е…Ҙе…ғзҙ  Parameters key: иҰҒжҸ’е…Ҙзҡ„ key modify: еҜ№иҠӮзӮ№иҝӣиЎҢдҝ®ж”№гҖӮй»ҳи®ӨдёҚдҝ®ж”№ иӢҘе·ІжңүеҗҢеҗҚе…ғзҙ пјҢжҸ’е…ҘеңЁеҗҺйқўгҖӮ ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰпјҡO(logвҒЎn)O(\log n)O(logn) 2.2 еҲ йҷӨ .erase_by_key(const key_type &key) -> bool ж №жҚ®еҖјеҲ йҷӨе…ғзҙ  Parameter key: иҰҒеҲ йҷӨзҡ„ key. Returns bool: жҳҜеҗҰеҲ йҷӨжҲҗеҠҹпјҢжүҫдёҚеҲ°е…ғзҙ еҲҷиҝ”еӣһ false ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰпјҡO(logвҒЎn)O(\log n)O(logn) .erase_by_rank(size_type k) -> void ж №жҚ®дҪҚзҪ®еҲ йҷӨе…ғзҙ  Parameter k: еҲ йҷӨзҡ„дёӢж ҮгҖӮиҢғеӣҙ [0, size()-1] ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰпјҡO(logвҒЎn)O(\log n)O(logn) 2.3 дҝ®ж”№ .modify_by_rank(const size_type k, Modify &&modify) -> void дҝ®ж”№жҹҗдёҖдҪҚзҪ®дёҠзҡ„е…ғзҙ  Param k: дҪҚзҪ®гҖӮ[0, size()-1] modify: еҢҝеҗҚеҮҪж•°пјҢеҜ№е…ғзҙ зҡ„дҝ®ж”№ ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰпјҡO(logвҒЎn)O(\log n)O(logn) .modify_by_key(const key_type &key, Modify &&modify) -> bool жүҫеҲ°еҖјпјҢз„¶еҗҺдҝ®ж”№гҖӮжІЎжүҫеҲ°е°ұиҝ”еӣһ false Param key modify ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰпјҡO(logвҒЎn)O(\log n)O(logn) 2.4 жҹҘиҜў .kth(size_type k) -> node* иҝ”еӣһз¬¬ k дёӘдҪҚзҪ®дёҠзҡ„е…ғзҙ  Param k: дҪҚзҪ®пјҲkвҲҲ[0,size()вҲ’1]k\in [0,size()-1]kвҲҲ[0,size()вҲ’1]пјү Returns node* жҢҮеҗ‘иҠӮзӮ№зҡ„жҢҮй’Ҳ гҖҗжіЁж„ҸгҖ‘дёҚиҰҒз”ЁиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•иҺ·еҸ–иҠӮзӮ№е№¶дҝ®ж”№пјҢиҝҷж ·еӯҗеҒҡдёҚдјҡиҮӘеҠЁ pushup()/pushdown()пјҢж— жі•з»ҙжҠӨеҢәй—ҙ .rank(const key_type& key) -> size_type иҝ”еӣһиҝҷдёӘ key еҜ№еә”зҡ„жҺ’еҗҚ Param key: еҖј Returns size_type: дҪҚзҪ®гҖӮ[0,size()][0, size()][0,size()] .smaller_bound(const key_type& key) -> node* еүҚй©ұиҠӮзӮ№пјҢ<key .lower_bound(const key_type& key) -> node* >= key .upper_bound(const key_type& key) -> node* > key .root() -> node* .size() -> size_type 2.5 еҲҶиЈӮ .split_by_key() .split_by_rank() 2.6 еҗҲе№¶ .join() .merge() Weight Balanced Leafy Tree дҫӢйўҳпјҲдҪҝз”ЁдёҠйқўзҡ„иҝҷдёӘжқҝеӯҗпјү гҖҗTreap з»ҙжҠӨеҢәй—ҙеҠ еҮҸгҖҒеҢәй—ҙеҲ йҷӨгҖҒж•ҙдҪ“жҹҘиҜўгҖ‘P1486 [NOI2004] йғҒй—·зҡ„еҮәзәіе‘ҳ

title: ж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғ
content: ж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғ еҰӮжһңеңЁж ‘дёӯйҖүжӢ©жҹҗдёӘиҠӮзӮ№е№¶еҲ йҷӨпјҢиҝҷжЈөж ‘е°ҶеҲҶдёәиӢҘе№ІжЈөеӯҗж ‘пјҢз»ҹи®Ўеӯҗж ‘иҠӮзӮ№ж•°е№¶и®°еҪ•жңҖеӨ§еҖјгҖӮеҸ–йҒҚж ‘дёҠжүҖжңүиҠӮзӮ№пјҢдҪҝжӯӨжңҖеӨ§еҖјеҸ–еҲ°жңҖе°Ҹзҡ„иҠӮзӮ№иў«з§°дёәж•ҙдёӘж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғгҖӮ ж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғзҡ„жҖ§иҙЁ ж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғеҰӮжһңдёҚе”ҜдёҖпјҢеҲҷиҮіеӨҡжңүдёӨдёӘпјҢдё”иҝҷдёӨдёӘйҮҚеҝғзӣёйӮ»гҖӮ д»Ҙж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғдёәж №ж—¶пјҢжүҖжңүеӯҗж ‘зҡ„еӨ§е°ҸйғҪдёҚи¶…иҝҮж•ҙжЈөж ‘еӨ§е°Ҹзҡ„дёҖеҚҠгҖӮ ж ‘дёӯжүҖжңүзӮ№еҲ°жҹҗдёӘзӮ№зҡ„и·қзҰ»е’ҢдёӯпјҢеҲ°йҮҚеҝғзҡ„и·қзҰ»е’ҢжҳҜжңҖе°Ҹзҡ„пјӣеҰӮжһңжңүдёӨдёӘйҮҚеҝғпјҢйӮЈд№ҲеҲ°е®ғд»¬зҡ„и·қзҰ»е’ҢдёҖж ·гҖӮ жҠҠдёӨжЈөж ‘йҖҡиҝҮдёҖжқЎиҫ№зӣёиҝһеҫ—еҲ°дёҖжЈөж–°зҡ„ж ‘пјҢйӮЈд№Ҳж–°зҡ„ж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғеңЁиҝһжҺҘеҺҹжқҘдёӨжЈөж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғзҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„дёҠгҖӮ еңЁдёҖжЈөж ‘дёҠж·»еҠ жҲ–еҲ йҷӨдёҖдёӘеҸ¶еӯҗпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳе®ғзҡ„йҮҚеҝғжңҖеӨҡеҸӘз§»еҠЁдёҖжқЎиҫ№зҡ„и·қзҰ»гҖӮ жұӮи§ЈеҚ•жЈөж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғ жҲ‘д»¬дё»иҰҒеҲ©з”Ёз¬¬ 222 зӮ№жҖ§иҙЁжқҘжұӮи§ЈгҖӮ д»Јз Ғ1234567891011121314151617181920// иҝҷд»Ҫд»Јз Ғй»ҳи®ӨиҠӮзӮ№зј–еҸ·д»Һ 1 ејҖе§ӢпјҢеҚі i вҲҲ [1,n]int size[MAXN], // иҝҷдёӘиҠӮзӮ№зҡ„гҖҢеӨ§е°ҸгҖҚпјҲжүҖжңүеӯҗж ‘дёҠиҠӮзӮ№ж•° + иҜҘиҠӮзӮ№пјү weight[MAXN], // иҝҷдёӘиҠӮзӮ№зҡ„гҖҢйҮҚйҮҸгҖҚпјҢеҚіжүҖжңүеӯҗж ‘гҖҢеӨ§е°ҸгҖҚзҡ„жңҖеӨ§еҖј centroid[2]; // з”ЁдәҺи®°еҪ•ж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғпјҲеӯҳзҡ„жҳҜиҠӮзӮ№зј–еҸ·пјүvoid GetCentroid(int cur, int fa) { // cur иЎЁзӨәеҪ“еүҚиҠӮзӮ№ (current) size[cur] = 1; weight[cur] = 0; for (int i = head[cur]; i != -1; i = e[i].nxt) { if (e[i].to != fa) { // e[i].to иЎЁзӨәиҝҷжқЎжңүеҗ‘иҫ№жүҖйҖҡеҗ‘зҡ„иҠӮзӮ№гҖӮ GetCentroid(e[i].to, cur); size[cur] += size[e[i].to]; weight[cur] = max(weight[cur], size[e[i].to]); } } weight[cur] = max(weight[cur], n - size[cur]); if (weight[cur] <= n / 2) { // дҫқз…§ж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғзҡ„е®ҡд№үз»ҹи®Ў centroid[centroid[0] != 0] = cur; }} жұӮи§ЈжүҖжңүеӯҗж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғ жҲ‘д»¬дё»иҰҒеҲ©з”Ёз¬¬ 2,42,42,4 зӮ№жҖ§иҙЁжқҘжұӮи§ЈгҖӮ д»Јз Ғ1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132// O(n) жұӮеҮәжүҖжңүеӯҗж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғvector<int> fa;vector<vector<int>> adj;vector<int> siz, centroid, weight;// siz[u]: size of the tree rooted at `u`// centroid[u]: centroid of the tree rooted ar `u`// weight[u]: max size among all subtrees rooted at each child of `u`void dfs(int u, int f) { siz[u] = 1; centroid[u] = u; for (auto v : adj[u]) { if (v == f) continue; dfs(v, u); siz[u] += siz[v]; weight[u] = max(weight[u], siz[v]); } for (int v : adj[u]) { int p = centroid[v]; while (p != u) { if (max(weight[p], siz[u] - siz[p]) <= siz[u] / 2) { // ж»Ўи¶ійҮҚеҝғзҡ„е®ҡд№ү centroid[u] = p; break; } else // еҗ‘дёҠи·і // еҜ№дәҺдёҖжЈөд»ҘзӮ№ u дёәж №зҡ„еӯҗж ‘пјҢе…¶йҮҚеҝғдёҖе®ҡеңЁжүҖжңүд»Ҙ u зҡ„зӣҙжҺҘеӯҗиҠӮзӮ№дёәж №зҡ„еӯҗж ‘зҡ„йҮҚеҝғеҲ°зӮ№ u зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„дёҠгҖӮ p = fa[p]; } }}

title: еӯ—е…ёж ‘пјҲTrieпјү
content: еӯ—е…ёж ‘ еӯ—е…ёж ‘пјҲTrieпјүпјҢеҸҲз§°дёәеүҚзјҖж ‘жҲ–жҹҘжүҫж ‘пјҢжҳҜдёҖз§Қз”ЁдәҺеӯҳеӮЁеӯ—з¬ҰдёІйӣҶеҗҲзҡ„ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„гҖӮ д»Јз Ғ жҲ‘д»¬з”Ё cur иЎЁзӨәеҪ“еүҚ Trie ж ‘дёҠзҡ„иҠӮзӮ№пјҢжҜҸж¬ЎжҸ’е…ҘгҖҒжҹҘжүҫж—¶д»Һж №иҠӮзӮ№ cur = 1 ејҖе§ӢпјҢз•ҷеҮә 000 дҪңдёәз©әиҠӮзӮ№зҡ„ж Үеҝ—гҖӮ next[][] еҸҜд»ҘзңӢжҲҗжҳҜйӮ»жҺҘзҹ©йҳөпјҡз¬¬дёҖз»ҙжҳҜеӯ—е…ёж ‘зҡ„иҠӮзӮ№пјҢз¬¬дәҢз»ҙе…¶е®һжҳҜиҫ№жқғпјҲжҸ’е…Ҙзҡ„жҳҜе“ӘдёӘеӯ—з¬ҰпјүпјҢеҖјеҲҷжҳҜиҫ№зҡ„еҸҰдёҖдёӘз«ҜзӮ№гҖӮ жҜ”еҰӮиҜҙ next[i][w]=jпјҢеңЁж ‘дёҠеҸҜд»Ҙзӣҙи§ӮиЎЁзӨәжҲҗдёӢеӣҫ iвҹ¶wj\boxed{i}\overset{w}{\longrightarrow}\boxed{j} iвҖӢвҹ¶wвҖӢjвҖӢ дҫӢйўҳ P4551 жңҖй•ҝејӮжҲ–и·Ҝеҫ„Code12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364const int MAXN = 1e5 + 5;const int MAXV = 32;int n;vector<vector<array<int, 2>>> adj;vector<int> dis;int ans{0};struct Trie { vector<vector<int>> next; vector<int> exist; int cnt; void init() { next.assign(MAXN * MAXV, vi(2, 0)); cnt = 1; } void insert(int x) { for (int i = MAXV - 1, u = 1; i >= 0; i--) { int c = (x >> i) & 1; if (!next[u][c]) next[u][c] = ++cnt; u = next[u][c]; } } void get(int x) { int res = 0; int u = 1; for (int i = MAXV - 1; i >= 0; i--) { int c = (x >> i) & 1; if (next[u][c ^ 1]) { res |= 1 << i; u = next[u][c ^ 1]; } else u = next[u][c]; } ans = max(ans, res); }} trie;void dfs(int u, int f) { trie.insert(dis[u]); trie.get(dis[u]); for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) { if (v == f) continue; dis[v] = dis[u] ^ w; dfs(v, u); }}void solve() { cin >> n; dis.assign(n + 1, 0); trie.init(); adj.resize(n + 1); for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { int a, b, c; cin >> a >> b >> c; adj[a].push_back({b, c}); adj[b].push_back({a, c}); } dfs(1, 1); cout << ans << endl;}CF1980Gе®һжҲҳеӯ—е…ёж ‘йўҳгҖӮз»Ҹе…ёж ‘дёҠејӮжҲ–е’ҢжЁЎеһӢи®° dud_uduвҖӢ дёә uuu еҲ°ж ‘ж №иҠӮзӮ№и·Ҝеҫ„зҡ„ејӮжҲ–е’ҢпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ u,vu,vu,v и·Ҝеҫ„дёҠзҡ„ејӮжҲ–е’Ңдёә duвҠ•dvd_u\oplus d_vduвҖӢвҠ•dvвҖӢпјҢдёҺе…¶ LCALCALCA ж— е…іеҲ©з”ЁиҝҷдёҖзӮ№пјҢеҜ№дәҺиҝҷдёӘзҺҜпјҢжҲ‘д»¬зӯүд»·дәҺжұӮ maxвҒЎ(duвҠ•dvвҠ•w)\max\Big(d_u\oplus d_v\oplus w\Big)max(duвҖӢвҠ•dvвҖӢвҠ•w)гҖӮз”ұдәҺ v,wv,wv,w йғҪжҳҜз»ҷе®ҡзҡ„пјҢdvвҠ•w=Cd_v\oplus w=CdvвҖӢвҠ•w=C жҳҜзЎ®е®ҡзҡ„пјҢжҲ‘д»¬еёҢжңӣжұӮ maxвҒЎ(duвҠ•C)\max\Big(d_u\oplus C\Big)max(duвҖӢвҠ•C)гҖӮиҝҷдёӘе°ұжҳҜеӯ—е…ёж ‘зҡ„з»Ҹе…ёеә”з”ЁпјҡжұӮејӮжҲ–жңҖеӨ§еҖјгҖӮе…Ҳ O(n)O(n)O(n) жұӮеҮә d[]d[]d[] ж•°з»„пјҢеҜ№дәҺдҝ®ж”№пјҢжҲ‘д»¬з”Ё tag и®°еҪ•е…ЁеұҖдҝ®ж”№пјҢdep[] и®°еҪ•ж·ұеәҰзҡ„еҘҮеҒ¶жҖ§пјҢеҰӮжһң u,vu,vu,v зҡ„ dep[] еҘҮеҒ¶дёҚдёҖиҮҙпјҢжҲ‘д»¬иҰҒе…ҲејӮжҲ– tag еҶҚжүҫејӮжҲ–жңҖеӨ§еҖјгҖӮCode123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293struct Trie { static constexpr int MAXLOG = 31; int counter{0}; vector<int> cnt; vector<array<int, 2>> node; Trie(int N) : cnt((MAXLOG + 2) * N + 10), node((MAXLOG + 2) * N + 10), counter{0} {} void insert(int num) { int root = 0; for (int i = MAXLOG; i >= 0; i--) { int bit = (num >> i) & 1; if (!node[root][bit]) { node[root][bit] = ++counter; } root = node[root][bit]; cnt[root]++; } } void erase(int num) { int root = 0; for (int i = MAXLOG; i >= 0; i--) { int bit = (num >> i) & 1; if (!node[root][bit]) { node[root][bit] = ++counter; } root = node[root][bit]; cnt[root]--; } } // Finds the maximum possible value that can be obtained by XORing the given number with any number in the trie. // This function returns the number found on the trie. int findMax(int num) { int root{0}, ans{0}; for (int i = MAXLOG; i >= 0; i--) { int bit = (num >> i) & 1; if (node[root][!bit] && cnt[node[root][!bit]]) { ans |= (1 << i); root = node[root][!bit]; } else { root = node[root][bit]; } } return ans; }};void solve() { int n, q; cin >> n >> q; vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> adj(n + 1); for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) { int u, v, w; cin >> u >> v >> w; adj[u].emplace_back(v, w); adj[v].emplace_back(u, w); } vector<int> d(n + 1, 0), dep(n + 1, 0); auto dfs = [&](auto dfs, int u, int f) -> void { for (auto &[v, w] : adj[u]) { if (v == f) continue; d[v] = d[u] ^ w; dep[v] = !dep[u]; dfs(dfs, v, u); } }; dfs(dfs, 1, 0); vector<Trie> trie(2, Trie(n + 1)); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { trie[dep[i]].insert(d[i]); } int tag{0}; while (q--) { char c; int x, y; cin >> c; if (c == '^') { cin >> x; tag ^= x; } else { cin >> x >> y; trie[dep[x]].erase(d[x]); int ans1 = trie[dep[x]].findMax(d[x] ^ y); int ans2 = trie[!dep[x]].findMax(d[x] ^ y ^ tag); trie[dep[x]].insert(d[x]); cout << max(ans1, ans2) << " "; } } cout << endl;}гҖҗеүҚзјҖе’Ң + еӯ—е…ёж ‘дёҠжұӮејӮжҲ–жңҖеӨ§еҖјгҖ‘ CF1895D XOR ConstructionеҒҮеҰӮжҲ‘д»¬зЎ®е®ҡдәҶ b1b_1b1вҖӢпјҢйӮЈд№ҲеҜ№дәҺ bib_ibiвҖӢ иҖҢиЁҖпјҢbi=b1вҠ•a1вҠ•a2вҠ•вӢҜвҠ•aib_i=b_1\oplus a_1\oplus a_2\oplus \dots \oplus a_ibiвҖӢ=b1вҖӢвҠ•a1вҖӢвҠ•a2вҖӢвҠ•вӢҜвҠ•aiвҖӢгҖӮеӣ жӯӨжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘиҖғиҷ‘и®°еҪ• aia_iaiвҖӢ зҡ„еүҚзјҖејӮжҲ–е’Ң cic_iciвҖӢгҖӮз„¶еҗҺжһҡдёҫ b1b_1b1вҖӢпјҢи®Ўз®— bi=ciвҠ•b1b_i=c_i\oplus b_1biвҖӢ=ciвҖӢвҠ•b1вҖӢ зҡ„жңҖеӨ§еҖјпјҢйӮЈд№ҲжҲ‘д»¬еҸӘйңҖиҰҒж»Ўи¶і bi=nвҲ’1b_i=n-1biвҖӢ=nвҲ’1 еҚіеҸҜпјҲеӣ дёәйўҳзӣ®иҜҙжҳҺдәҶж–№жЎҲеҝ…е®ҡеӯҳеңЁпјүCode12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455#define FOR(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i <= b; i++)#define ROF(i, a, b) for (int i = a; i >= b; i--)/* ============================ CONFIG BEGIN ============================ */constexpr int N = 2e5 + 50;constexpr int V = 31;int n;int a[N], c[N], b[N];namespace Trie { int ch[N * 2][2]; int tot{0}; void clear() { memset(ch, 0, sizeof(ch)); } void insert(int x) { int cur = 0; ROF(i, V, 0) { int c = x >> i & 1; if (!ch[cur][c]) ch[cur][c] = ++tot; cur = ch[cur][c]; } // cerr << cur << endl; } int varify(int u) { int cur = 0; int res = 0; ROF(i, V, 0) { int c = u >> i & 1; if (ch[cur][c ^ 1]) c ^= 1, cur = ch[cur][c], res ^= 1 << i; else cur = ch[cur][c]; } return res; }}; // namespace Trie/* ============================= CONFIG END ============================= */void solve() { cin >> n; FOR(i, 2, n) cin >> a[i]; FOR(i, 1, n) c[i] = c[i - 1] ^ a[i]; Trie::clear(); FOR(i, 1, n) Trie::insert(c[i]); // cerr << Trie::tot << endl; FOR(i, 0, n - 1) { // cerr << i << ": " << Trie::varify(i) << " "; if (Trie::varify(i) == n - 1) { FOR(j, 1, n) cout << (c[j] ^ i) << " "; break; } } cout << endl; // cerr << endl;}

зҡ„дёӨдёӘзҠ¶жҖҒжҜ”иҫғзұ»дјј 2-SATпјҢжҲ‘д»¬зҡ„зЎ®еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ё 2-SAT и§ЈеҶігҖӮжҠҠ вҲ’1-1вҲ’1 зңӢжҲҗ falseпјҢ111 зңӢжҲҗ trueпјҢдёүдёӘж•° (x,y,z)(x,y,z)(x,y,z) иҮіе°‘жңүдёӨдёӘ 111 зӯүд»·дәҺпјҡx,yx,yx,y дёӯиҮіе°‘дёҖдёӘ 111 дё” y,zy,zy,z дёӯиҮіе°‘дёҖдёӘ 111 дё” x,zx,zx,z дёӯиҮіе°‘дёҖдёӘ 111гҖӮиҝҷж ·пјҢжҲ‘д»¬е°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҘ—з”Ё 2-SAT жқҘжұӮи§ЈдәҶгҖӮCode123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122123124125using Graph = vector<vector<int>>;class TwoSAT { static const int MAXN = 1e5 + 5; int n_vars; Graph g; vector<int> dfn, low, instack; vector<int> stk; int _stamp{0}, _colorcnt{0}; bool satisfiable; void init(int vars) { g.resize(2 * vars); dfn.assign(2 * vars, 0); low.assign(2 * vars, 0); instack.assign(2 * vars, 0); color.assign(2 * vars, 0); ans.assign(vars, 0); stk.clear(); _stamp = _colorcnt = 0; } void connect(int u, int v) { g[u].push_back(v); } void tarjan(int u) { low[u] = dfn[u] = ++_stamp; stk.push_back(u); instack[u] = 1; for (int v : g[u]) { if (!dfn[v]) { tarjan(v); low[u] = min(low[u], low[v]); } else if (instack[v]) low[u] = min(low[u], dfn[v]); } if (low[u] == dfn[u]) { ++_colorcnt; while (true) { int v = stk.back(); stk.pop_back(); instack[v] = 0; color[v] = _colorcnt; if (v == u) break; } } } void answer() { // Tarjan жүҫзҺҜпјҢSCC зј–еҸ·жҳҜжӢ“жү‘йҖҶеәҸгҖӮ for (int i = 1; i <= n_vars; i++) { if (color[i] < color[i + n_vars]) ans[i] = 1; else ans[i] = 0; } } public: vector<int> color; vector<int> ans; TwoSAT() : n_vars{0} {} explicit TwoSAT(int vars) : n_vars{vars} { init(vars + 1); } // (x== x_is) || (y== y_is), at least one is true void add_clause_or(int x, bool x_is, int y, bool y_is) { this->connect(x + (x_is ? n_vars : 0), y + (y_is ? 0 : n_vars)); this->connect(y + (y_is ? n_vars : 0), x + (x_is ? 0 : n_vars)); } // (x==x_is) ^ (y==y_is), exactly one is true void add_clause_xor(int x, bool x_is, int y, bool y_is) { this->add_clause_or(x, x_is, y, y_is); this->add_clause_or(x, !x_is, y, !y_is); } // (x==x_is) == (y==y_is), they should have same value void add_clause_and(int x, bool x_is, int y, bool y_is) { this->add_clause_or(x, !x_is, y, y_is); this->add_clause_or(x, x_is, y, !y_is); } void solve() { for (int i = 1; i <= n_vars * 2; i++) if (!dfn[i]) this->tarjan(i); for (int i = 1; i <= n_vars; i++) { if (color[i] == color[i + n_vars]) { satisfiable = false; return; } } satisfiable = true; this->answer(); } bool is_satisfiable() { return satisfiable; } auto solution() { return ans; }}; // class TwoSAT void solve() { int n; cin >> n; vector<vector<int>> grid(4, vector<int>(n + 1)); for (int i = 1; i <= 3; i++) { for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) { cin >> grid[i][j]; } } TwoSAT tsat(n); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { int c1 = grid[1][i], c2 = grid[2][i], c3 = grid[3][i]; tsat.add_clause_or(abs(c1), c1 > 0, abs(c2), c2 > 0); tsat.add_clause_or(abs(c2), c2 > 0, abs(c3), c3 > 0); tsat.add_clause_or(abs(c3), c3 > 0, abs(c1), c1 > 0); } tsat.solve(); if (!tsat.is_satisfiable()) { cout << "NO" << endl; } else { cout << "YES" << endl; }}ARC069F FlagsгҖҗ2-SATгҖҒзәҝж®өж ‘дјҳеҢ–е»әеӣҫгҖҒдәҢеҲҶгҖ‘йҰ–е…ҲеҜ№дәҺдёҖдёӘж——еӯҗ iiiпјҢиҰҒд№ҲйҖүжӢ©жҸ’еңЁ xix_ixiвҖӢпјҢиҰҒд№ҲжҸ’еңЁ yiy_iyiвҖӢпјҢиҝҷйҮҢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ° 2-SAT зҡ„еҪұеӯҗгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬иҖғиҷ‘еҰӮдҪ•жүҫеҮә maxвҒЎd\max dmaxdгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘдәҢеҲҶзӯ”жЎҲпјҢз„¶еҗҺиҪ¬еҢ–дёәеҲӨе®ҡй—®йўҳгҖӮ2-SAT еҲӨе®ҡжҳҜ O(n)O(n)O(n) зҡ„пјҢдәҢеҲҶжҳҜ O(logвҒЎx)O(\log x)O(logx) зҡ„пјҢдҪҶжҳҜ2-SAT зҡ„е»әеӣҫеҰӮжһңжҢүжңҙзҙ ж–№жі•е»әеӣҫжҳҜ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) зҡ„гҖӮжҲ‘д»¬и§ӮеҜҹеҲ°еҜ№дәҺдёӨдёӘж——еӯҗ i,ji,ji,j е’Ңжһҡдёҫзҡ„зӯ”жЎҲ DDDеҰӮжһң yjx_i\implies y_jxiвҖӢвҹ№yjвҖӢеҰӮжһң вҲЈxiвҲ’yjвҲЈ<D|x_i-y_j|<DвҲЈxiвҖӢвҲ’yjвҖӢвҲЈ<DпјҢиҜҙжҳҺ iii жҸ’еңЁ xix_ixiвҖӢ зҡ„иҜқпјҢjjj е°ұдёҚиғҪжҸ’еңЁ yjy_jyjвҖӢпјҢеҝ…йЎ»жҸ’еңЁ xjx_jxjвҖӢпјҢеҸҚд№ӢдәҰз„¶гҖӮxi вҹ№ xjx_i\implies x_jxiвҖӢвҹ№xjвҖӢеҰӮжһң вҲЈyiвҲ’xjвҲЈ<D|y_i-x_j|<DвҲЈyiвҖӢвҲ’xjвҖӢвҲЈ<DпјҢиҜҙжҳҺ iii жҸ’еңЁ yiy_iyiвҖӢ зҡ„иҜқпјҢjjj е°ұдёҚиғҪжҸ’еңЁ xjx_jxjвҖӢпјҢеҝ…йЎ»жҸ’еңЁ yjy_jyjвҖӢпјҢеҸҚд№ӢдәҰз„¶гҖӮyi вҹ№ yjy_i\implies y_jyiвҖӢвҹ№yjвҖӢеҰӮжһң вҲЈyiвҲ’yjвҲЈ<D|y_i-y_j|<DвҲЈyiвҖӢвҲ’yjвҖӢвҲЈ<DпјҢиҜҙжҳҺ iii жҸ’еңЁ yiy_iyiвҖӢ зҡ„иҜқпјҢjjj е°ұдёҚиғҪжҸ’еңЁ yjy_jyjвҖӢпјҢеҝ…йЎ»жҸ’еңЁ xjx_jxjвҖӢпјҢеҸҚд№ӢдәҰз„¶гҖӮyi вҹ№ xjy_i\implies x_jyiвҖӢвҹ№xjвҖӢиҖҢз»ҷе®ҡдёҖдёӘиҢғеӣҙзҡ„иҜқпјҢдҫӢеҰӮеңЁз¬¬дёҖз§Қжғ…еҶөйҮҢпјҢxi,Dx_i,DxiвҖӢ,D йғҪзЎ®е®ҡзҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢxjx_jxjвҖӢ иҗҪеңЁдёҖдёӘиҝһз»ӯзҡ„еҢәй—ҙ (xiвҲ’D,xi+D)(x_i-D, x_i+D)(xiвҖӢвҲ’D,xiвҖӢ+D) йҮҢпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸӘйңҖиҰҒз»ҷеҢәй—ҙйҮҢзҡ„жҜҸдёҖдёӘзӮ№иҝһиҫ№е°ұеҸҜд»ҘдәҶгҖӮдҪҶжҳҜеҰӮжһңйҒҚеҺҶж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰе°ұжҳҜ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2)пјҢеҢәй—ҙ +++ иҝһиҫ№пјҢжүҖд»ҘеҸҜд»ҘиҖғиҷ‘зәҝж®өж ‘дјҳеҢ–е»әеӣҫгҖӮCode123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122123124125126127128129constexpr int MAXN = 5e4;constexpr int MAXM = MAXN * 5;int n;struct Flag { int pos; int id, opid; bool operator<(const Flag &f) const { return pos < f.pos; }};array<Flag, MAXN> flags;int tot;/* 2-SAT */vector<vector<int>> g;void connect(int u, int v) { g[u].push_back(v);}array<int, MAXM> dfn, low, instak, color;vector<int> stk;int totcolor, stamp;void tarjan(int u) { low[u] = dfn[u] = ++stamp; stk.push_back(u); instak[u] = 1; for (auto v : g[u]) { if (!dfn[v]) { tarjan(v); low[u] = min(low[u], low[v]); } else if (instak[v]) { low[u] = min(low[u], dfn[v]); } } if (low[u] == dfn[u]) { totcolor++; while (true) { int v = stk.back(); stk.pop_back(); instak[v] = 0; color[v] = totcolor; if (v == u) break; } }}/* Segment */array<int, MAXM> idtree;void build(int p, int l, int r) { idtree[p] = ++tot; if (l == r) { connect(idtree[p], flags[l].opid); return; } int mid = l + ((r - l) >> 1); build(p << 1, l, mid); build(p << 1 | 1, mid + 1, r); connect(idtree[p], idtree[p << 1]); connect(idtree[p], idtree[p << 1 | 1]);}void link(int p, int l, int r, int from, int rl, int rr) { if (rl > r || rr < l) return; if (rl <= l && r <= rr) { connect(from, idtree[p]); return; } int mid = l + ((r - l) >> 1); link(p << 1, l, mid, from, rl, rr); link(p << 1 | 1, mid + 1, r, from, rl, rr);}int where(int k) { return upper_bound(flags.begin() + 1, flags.begin() + 2 * n + 1, Flag{k}) - flags.begin();}bool check(int len) { /* #region reset */ tot = 2 * n; totcolor = stamp = 0; for (int i = 0; i < MAXM; i++) { dfn[i] = low[i] = instak[i] = 0; g[i].clear(); } /* #endregion */ // build build(1, 1, 2 * n); for (int i = 1; i <= n * 2; i++) { int p = flags[i].pos; int l = where(p - len); int r = where(p + len - 1) - 1; if (l < i) link(1, 1, 2 * n, flags[i].id, l, i - 1); if (r > i) link(1, 1, 2 * n, flags[i].id, i + 1, r); } // 2-sat for (int i = 1; i <= 2 * n; i++) if (!dfn[i]) tarjan(i); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (color[i] == color[i + n]) return 1; return 0;}void solve() { cin >> n; g.assign(MAXM, {}); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { cin >> flags[i].pos >> flags[i + n].pos; flags[i].id = flags[i + n].opid = i; flags[i + n].id = flags[i].opid = i + n; } sort(flags.begin() + 1, flags.begin() + 2 * n + 1); // дәҢеҲҶзӯ”жЎҲ int L = 0, R = flags[2 * n].pos - flags[1].pos + 1; while (L < R) { int mid = L + ((R - L) >> 1); if (check(mid)) R = mid; else L = mid + 1; } cout << L - 1 << endl;}

Voronoi еӣҫзҡ„жҖ§иҙЁ Vor(S)Vor(S)Vor(S) зҡ„жҜҸдёҖжқЎиҫ№йғҪеңЁжҹҗдёҖеҜ№зӮ№еҜ№зҡ„еһӮзӣҙе№іеҲҶзәҝдёҠ жҜҸдёӘ Voronoi зӮ№йғҪиҮіе°‘жҳҜ 333 жқЎ Voronoi иҫ№зҡ„дәӨзӮ№ жұӮи§Ј Voronoi еӣҫ еўһйҮҸжһ„йҖ жі•

title: BGPпјҡISP д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„и·Ҝз”ұйҖүжӢ©
content: ISP д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„и·Ҝз”ұйҖүжӢ© About BGPBGP жҳҜ ISP д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„и·Ҝз”ұйҖүжӢ©з®—жі•гҖӮ дёәд»Җд№ҲйңҖиҰҒ BGPпјҹеңЁдёҖдёӘи§„жЁЎеҫҲеӨ§зҡ„зҪ‘з»ңйҮҢпјҢи·Ҝз”ұдҝЎжҒҜзҡ„еӯҳеӮЁгҖҒдј иҫ“е’Ңи®Ўз®—зҡ„ејҖй”Җе·ЁеӨ§гҖӮиҖғиҷ‘дёҖдёӘеҫҲеӨ§зҡ„зҪ‘з»ңпјҢеҢ…еҗ«еҚғдёҮдёӘ RouterгҖӮеҰӮжһңдҪҝз”Ё DV з®—жі•пјҢйӮЈд№ҲжҜҸдёҖдёӘ Router йғҪйңҖиҰҒзӯүеҫ…жүҖжңүе…¶д»–зҡ„ Router зҡ„ DV дҝЎжҒҜпјҢж”¶ж•ӣеҫҲж…ўпјӣеҰӮжһңдҪҝз”Ё LS з®—жі•пјҢе°ұйңҖиҰҒдј иҫ“еҚғдёҮдёӘ LS дҝЎжҒҜпјҢд»ҘеҸҠе…¶еӯҳеӮЁе’Ңи®Ўз®—пјҢиө„жәҗејҖй”Җе·ЁеӨ§гҖӮз®ЎзҗҶй—®йўҳз®ЎзҗҶе‘ҳеёҢжңӣеҸҜд»Ҙз®ЎзҗҶеӯҗзҪ‘з»ңгҖҒеҜ№еӨ–йҡҗи—Ҹз»ҶиҠӮгҖҒеҗҢж—¶дә’иҒ”гҖӮ еұӮж¬Ўи·Ҝз”ұ дёӨдёӘеұӮж¬Ўпјҡ Inter-ASпјҲдёҚеҗҢзҡ„еӯҗиҮӘжІ»еҢәеҹҹд№Ӣй—ҙпјүгҖҗеӨ–зҪ‘гҖ‘ Intra-ASпјҲжҜҸдёҖдёӘеӯҗиҮӘжІ»еҢәеҹҹпјүгҖҗеҶ…зҪ‘гҖ‘ дјҳзӮ№пјҡ и§ЈеҶіз®ЎзҗҶй—®йўҳ AS еҶ…йғЁеҸҜд»ҘиҝҗиЎҢдёҚеҗҢзҡ„ Routing Algo еҸҜд»Ҙйҡҗи—ҸеҶ…йғЁзҡ„з»ҶиҠӮ и§ЈеҶіи§„жЁЎй—®йўҳ AS еҶ…йғЁзҡ„и·Ҝз”ұж•°йҮҸдёҚдјҡеӨӘеӨҡ ScalableпјҢжҜҸеўһеҠ дёҖдёӘеӯҗзҪ‘пјҢеҜ№дәҺе…¶д»– AS жқҘиҜҙеҸӘжҳҜеӨҡдәҶдёҖйЎ№ Table Entry BGP е°Ҫз®Ў AS еҶ…йғЁзҡ„ Routing Algo еҸҜд»ҘдёҚеҗҢпјҢдҪҶжҳҜ AS д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„ Routing Algo еҝ…йЎ»зӣёеҗҢпјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜ BGP еҚҸи®®гҖӮBGP зӣёеҪ“дәҺж—¶жҠҠдә’иҒ”зҪ‘зҡ„дёҚеҗҢ AS зІҳиө·жқҘгҖӮ BGP еҲҶжҲҗдёӨдёӘйғЁеҲҶпјҡeBGP (exterior) е’Ң iBGP (interior)гҖӮ eBGPпјҡе°ҶиҝҷдёӘ AS еҶ…йғЁзҡ„и·Ҝз”ұдҝЎжҒҜеҸ‘йҖҒеҲ°еӨ–зҪ‘ iBGPпјҡе°ҶеӨ–зҪ‘зҡ„и·Ҝз”ұдҝЎжҒҜеҸ‘йҖҒеҲ° AS еҶ…йғЁзҡ„е…¶д»– RouterпјҲеҢ…еҗ«зҪ‘е…іпјү еҹәдәҺж”№иҝӣзҡ„ DV дёӨдёӘжңҖйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„еұһжҖ§пјҡ AS-PATH еҲ°иҫҫзӣ®ж Үзҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„дёҠпјҢз»ҸиҝҮзҡ„ Hops жЈҖжөӢеҸҜиғҪзҡ„зҺҜи·Ҝ NEXT-HOP еҜ№дәҺдёҖз§ҚеӯҗзҪ‘еүҚзјҖпјҢе‘ҠиҜүдҪ еҸҜд»Ҙи·іеҲ°е“ӘдёҖдёӘ Hop BGP дёҺ Forward Table title: Networks for Data Center
content: Networks for Data Center Main Challenges: Reliability Balancing Load: avoid bottlenecks in processing, networking, and data Multiple Applications (even when massive number of clients) Network Structure Structure иҝҷж ·з»“жһ„зҡ„еҘҪеӨ„жҳҜпјҡ Rich Interconnection вҶ’\toвҶ’ жҸҗеҚҮ Racks д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„ Throughput жҸҗеҚҮ RedundancyпјҢиҝӣиҖҢжҸҗеҚҮ Reliability дёҚеҗҢзҡ„ Server Blades д№Ӣй—ҙеҸҜд»ҘжңүеҫҲеӨҡжқЎи·Ҝеҫ„иҝһжҺҘгҖӮ Load Balancer зү№зӮ№ зӢ¬з«ӢдәҺ Data Center жҸҗдҫӣ Application Layer еұӮйқўзҡ„ Routing е·ҘдҪңжөҒзЁӢ жҺҘж”¶ External Client Requests еңЁ Data Center еҶ…йғЁйҮҚе®ҡеҗ‘ Workload жҠҠж•°жҚ®иҝ”еӣһз»ҷ External Client йҖҡиҝҮ Load BalancerпјҢData Center жҠҠеҶ…йғЁзҡ„еӨҚжқӮеӨ„зҗҶеҜ№еӨ–йғЁ Client йҡҗи—ҸгҖӮ Protocol Innovations Link Layer: RoCE е…Ёз§°пјҡremote direct memory access (RDMA) over Converged Ethernet Transport Layer ECNпјҢз”ЁдәҺ Congestion Control experimentation with hop-by-hop (backpressure) congestion control Routing, Management SDN widely used within/among organizationsвҖҷ datacenters place related services, data as close as possible (e.g., in same rack or nearby rack) to minimize tier-2, tier-1 communication

title: IPv4
content: IPv4 IP Datagram IP Datagram IP address: 32-bit identifier associated with each host or router interface interface: connection between host/router and physical link Subnet гҖҗе®ҡд№үгҖ‘device interfaces that can physically reach each other without passing through an intervening router Subnet IPv4 зҡ„ IP Address еҸҜд»ҘеҲҶи§ЈжҲҗдёӨйғЁеҲҶпјҡжүҖеұһзҡ„ Subnet + Host Part гҖҗCIDR (Classless InterDomain Routing) ж јејҸгҖ‘ Subnet mask: XXX.XXX.XXX.XXX/B XXX.XXX.XXX.XXX иЎЁзӨәжңҖй«ҳзҡ„ BBB дҪҚжҜ”зү№иЎЁзӨәзҡ„ BBB иЎЁзӨә Subnet ж ҮиҜҶзҡ„дҪҚж•° How to Get IP Address? зЎ¬зј–з ҒеҶҷеңЁ configuration йҮҢ DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol): get IP from server DHCP жөҒзЁӢhost broadcasts DHCP discover msg (optional)DHCP server responds with DHCP offer msg (optional)host requests IP address: DHCP request msgDHCP server sends address: DHCP ack msgThe two steps above can be skipped вҖңif a client remembers and wishes to reuse a previously allocated network addressвҖқ DHCP can return more than just allocated IP address on subnet: address of first-hop router for client name and IP address of DNS sever network mask (indicating network versus host portion of address) IP Address: Hierarchical addressing дёҖдёӘз»„з»Үз®ЎзҗҶдёҖжү№ address жҜ”еҰӮиҜҙ 200.23.16.0/20 е’Ң 199.31.0.0/16 дёӨдёӘз»„з»Ү еҰӮжһңжңүдёҖеӨ©дёҖдёӘ sub-org 200.23.18.0/23 д»Һ 200.23.16.0/20 жҗ¬еҲ° 199.31.0.0/16 иҝҷйҮҢпјҢLongest Prefix Match е°ұеҸ‘жҢҘз”ЁеӨ„дәҶ жҲ‘д»¬еҸӘйңҖиҰҒдҝ®ж”№ 199.31.0.0/16 зҡ„ Forward Table дёӯзҡ„дёҖйЎ№еҚіеҸҜгҖӮ

title: Error Detection and Correction
content: Error Detection and Correction EDC: error detection and correction bits пјҲдёҚдёҖе®ҡ 100% еҸҜйқ пјү Technique 1: Parity Check еҘҮеҒ¶жҖ§жЈҖжҹҘ Single Bit2D Bit ParityBit=1Bit = 1Bit=1 иЎЁзӨәжңүеҘҮж•°дёӘ 111пјҢеҸҚд№ӢеҒ¶ж•°дёӘ 111жҠҠж•°жҚ®жҺ’жҲҗдәҢз»ҙд№ӢеҗҺпјҢеҜ№жҜҸдёҖиЎҢе’ҢжҜҸдёҖеҲ—йғҪи®Ўз®— Parity BitгҖӮе№¶дё”йҖҡиҝҮиҝҷз§Қж–№ејҸпјҢиҝҳиғҪзЎ®е®ҡжҳҜе“ӘдёҖдёӘ bit еҮәй”ҷдәҶгҖӮ Parity Check Internet Checksum еҸ‘йҖҒж–№пјҡе…Ҳе°Ҷ Segment Contents и§ҶдёәеӨҡдёӘ 16-bit зҡ„ж•ҙж•°пјҢз„¶еҗҺзӣҙжҺҘзӣёеҠ пјҢжәўеҮәйғЁеҲҶеҠ еӣһеҺ»пјҢжңҖеҗҺе…ЁйғЁеҸ–еҸҚгҖӮ Cyclic Redundency Check жҠҠе…ЁйғЁзҡ„ж•°жҚ® DDD зңӢжҲҗжҳҜдёҖдёӘж•ҙж•°пјҢйҖүжӢ©дёҖдёӘ r+1r+1r+1 bits зҡ„ Generator GGGгҖӮ жҲ‘д»¬еёҢжңӣйҖүеҮә rrr дҪҚзҡ„ CRC з Ғ RRRпјҢдҪҝеҫ— DГ—2r+RвүЎ0(modG)D\times 2^r+R\equiv 0\pmod GDГ—2r+RвүЎ0(modG)гҖӮиҝҷз§Қж–№жі•еҸҜд»ҘжЈҖжөӢеҮә 1вҲјr1\sim r1вҲјr дҪҚ bit errorгҖӮ йҖҡиҝҮж•°еӯҰи®Ўз®—еҸҜд»Ҙеҫ—еҲ° R=remainder(DГ—2rG)R=\text{remainder}(\frac{D\times 2^r}{G})R=remainder(GDГ—2rвҖӢ)пјҲеңЁжЁЎ 222 ж„Ҹд№үдёӢпјҢдәҢиҝӣеҲ¶зҡ„еҠ еҮҸжі•зӯүдәҺејӮжҲ–иҝҗз®—пјү

title: Link Layer
content: Link Layer Terminology FrameLink Layer еҸ‘йҖҒзҡ„ж•°жҚ®дёә FrameпјҢйўқеӨ–жҗәеёҰе…¶д»–дҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ Link Layer иҙҹиҙЈе°Ҷ Frame д»ҺдёҖдёӘ Node дј иҫ“еҲ°еҸҰдёҖдёӘзү©зҗҶдёҠзӣёйӮ»зҡ„ NodeгҖӮ Link Layer жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„жңҚеҠЎ жү“еҢ…пјҡFraming, Link Access encapsulate datagram into frame; adding header, trailer channel access if shared medium вҖңMACвҖқ addresses in frame headers identify source, destination (different from IP address!) Reliable Delivery йҖҡеёёз”ЁдәҺ High-Error-Rate LinksпјҢеҰӮ WiFi Flow Controlи°ғж•ҙзӣёйӮ»иҠӮзӮ№д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„дј иҫ“йҖҹзҺҮ Error Detection errors caused by signal attenuation, noise. жЈҖжөӢеҲ°й”ҷиҜҜд№ӢеҗҺпјҢиҰҒжұӮ retransmit жҲ–иҖ…зӣҙжҺҘ drop Error CorrectionReceiver зӣҙжҺҘжЈҖжөӢ Bit Error е№¶дҝ®жӯЈпјҢдёҚз”ЁйҮҚж–°дј иҫ“ Half-Duplex or Full-Duplexwith half duplex, nodes at both ends of link can transmit, but not at same time Implementation еңЁжҜҸдёҖдёӘ Host йҮҢйғҪжңү йҖҡеёёжҳҜ on-chip жҲ–иҖ… in Network Interface Card Attach to Host System Bus жҳҜ Software, Hardware, Firmware зҡ„йӣҶжҲҗ жөҒзЁӢ еҸ‘йҖҒж–№пјҡе°ҒиЈ… Datagram дёә Frameж·»еҠ йўқеӨ–дҝЎжҒҜпјҢеҰӮ Error Checking Bit жҺҘж”¶ж–№пјҡжЈҖжҹҘ Error Checking BitпјҢFlow Control зӯүдҝЎжҒҜжҸҗеҸ– DatagramпјҢдј з»ҷ Upper Layer

title: NAT жҠҖжңҜпјҡзј“и§Ј IPv4 еҲҶй…ҚеҚұжңә
content: NAT, Network Address Translation NAT: all devices in local network share just one IPv4 address as far as outside world is concerned дјҳеҠҝ еҸӘйңҖиҰҒ 111 дёӘ IP address е°ұеҸҜд»ҘдҫӣдёҖжү№ Host дҪҝз”Ё can change addresses of host in local network without notifying outside world can change ISP without changing addresses of devices in local network security: devices inside local net not directly addressable, visible by outside world еҠЈеҠҝ routers вҖңshouldвҖқ only process up to layer 3 address вҖңshortageвҖқ should be solved by IPv6 violates end-to-end argument (port # manipulation by network-layer device) NAT traversal: what if client wants to connect to server behind NAT? е®һзҺ° NAT NAT иҰҒе°ҶеҸ‘еҮәеҺ»зҡ„ Datagram йҮҢзҡ„ source IP Address, source port ID жӣҝжҚўдёә NAT IP Address, new port ID з»ҙжҠӨдёҖдёӘиЎЁпјҢи®°еҪ•еҸ‘еҮәеҺ»зҡ„ Datagram е’Ң Local Network Host зҡ„еҜ№еә”е…ізі» е°ҶжҺҘж”¶еҲ°зҡ„ Datagram йҮҢзҡ„ dest IP Address, dest port ID йҮҚж–°жӣҝжҚўеӣһ source IP Address, source port IDпјҢиҪ¬еҸ‘еӣһ Local Network

title: Network Layer Overview
content: Network Layer Service view еҸ‘йҖҒж–№ д»Һ Transport Layer жӢҝеҲ°дёҖдёӘ UDP жҲ– TCPпјҢе°ҒиЈ…жҲҗ IP DatagramпјҢз„¶еҗҺеҸ‘йҖҒеҲ° Link Layer пјҲз”ұ Link Layer иҙҹиҙЈиҪ¬еҸ‘еҲ°дёӢдёҖдёӘ HopпјүгҖӮ жҺҘеҸ—ж–№ жӢҝеҲ° Datagram еҗҺиҝӣиЎҢдёҖзі»еҲ—жЈҖжҹҘпјҢжҠҠ Payload жҸҗеҸ–еҮәжқҘдј з»ҷ Transport Layer Router жЈҖжҹҘ IP Datagram зҡ„ header жҠҠ Datagram д»Һ Input port иҪ¬з§»еҲ° Output port Network-Layer Functions Forwarding: пјҲRouter еҶ…йғЁпјүжҠҠ Datagram д»Һ Input port иҪ¬з§»еҲ° Output port еҜ№еә” Data Plane Routing: пјҲе…ЁеұҖ NetworkпјүеҶіе®ҡ Datagram иҜҘиө°е“Әдәӣ Router еҜ№еә” control Plane дёӨз§Қж–№жЎҲпјҡ Tranditional Routing Algorithms . еңЁ **жҜҸдёӘ Router еҶ…йғЁ** е®һзҺ° SDN Software-Defined Networking . еңЁ **еҚ•** дёӘ **Remote Server** е®һзҺ° Service Model Service Provided еҮ зӮ№еҺҹеҲҷпјҡ simplicity of mechanism sufficient provisioning of bandwidth replicated, application-layer distributed services

title: Internet Routing: OSPF
content: Internet Routing: OSPF OSPFOSPF жҳҜд»Ҙ DijkstraвҖҷs Shortest Path дёәжЁЎжқҝзҡ„ Routing з®—жі•пјҢжҳҜз»Ҹе…ёзҡ„ Link State Protocol. з®—жі•з»ҶиҠӮ жҜҸдёҖдёӘ Router йғҪжҠҠиҮӘе·ұзҡ„дҝЎжҒҜйҖҡиҝҮ Link еҗ‘еӨ– broadcastпјҢзӣҙеҲ° Domain еҶ…зҡ„жүҖжңүе…¶д»– RouterгҖӮ еӣ жӯӨпјҢжҜҸдёӘ Router еҶ…пјҢйғҪжңүж•ҙдёӘ Domain зҡ„еӣҫз»“жһ„пјҢеҸҜд»ҘеңЁеҶ…йғЁи·‘дёҖдёӘ DijkstraпјҢжһ„йҖ  Forward TableгҖӮ Security жүҖжңүзҡ„ OSPF зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜйғҪиҰҒз»ҸиҝҮйӘҢиҜҒ (authenticated) Hierarchical OSPF еҫҲжҳҫз„¶пјҢйҷӨдәҶеҶ…зҪ‘зҡ„ RoutingпјҢLocal Domain дёҚеҸҜйҒҝе…Қзҡ„йңҖиҰҒе’ҢеӨ–зҪ‘иҝӣиЎҢйҖҡдҝЎгҖӮдәҺжҳҜжҲ‘д»¬жҠҠиҝһжҺҘеҗ„дёӘ Local Domain зҡ„ Router з§°дёә вҖңBoundary RouterвҖқпјҢзңҹжӯЈеңЁеӨ–зҪ‘дё”дёҚе’ҢеҶ…зҪ‘иҝһжҺҘзҡ„з§°дёә вҖңBackbone RouterвҖқпјҢиҖҢеҗ„дёӘеҶ…зҪ‘йҮҢиғҪеӨҹиҝһжҺҘеҲ° Backbone зҡ„ Router з§°дёә вҖңArea Border RouterвҖқпјҢе…¶дҪҷзҡ„з§°дёә вҖңInternal RouterвҖқгҖӮ еӣ дёә Area Border Router еҢ…еҗ«жүҖжңүеҶ…зҪ‘зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜ (вҖңSummarizeвҖқ)пјҢеҸӘиҰҒд»–жҠҠиҝҷдёӘдҝЎжҒҜдј йҖ’еҮәеҺ»пјҢе°ұзӣёеҪ“дәҺжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘеҶ…зҪ‘жүҖжңү Rounter зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ

title: Router и·Ҝз”ұ
content: Router Architecture Input Port Innput Port д»Һ Link Layer жҺҘж”¶ FrameпјҢжЈҖжҹҘе®Ң Header еҗҺи§ЈеҢ…пјҢжҸҗеҸ– IP DatagramгҖӮ Switching: еҲ©з”Ё Header Field зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜпјҢе’ҢеӮЁеӯҳеңЁ Input Port Memory йҮҢзҡ„ Forward Table жҹҘжүҫ Output Port. еҰӮжһң Forward йҖҹеәҰжҜ”жҺҘж”¶зҡ„йҖҹеәҰж…ўзҡ„иҜқпјҢйңҖиҰҒ Queuing Destination-Based Forwarding : forward based only on destination IP address (traditional) Generalized Forwarding : forward based on any set of header field values Forward Table Longest Prefix Matchи·Ҝз”ұеҷЁеңЁ Forward Table йҮҢжүҫ dest address зҡ„ entry зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢдјҡз”Ё жңҖй•ҝзҡ„еүҚзјҖеҢ№й…Қ зҡ„йӮЈдёӘ entry. often performed using ternary content addressable memories (TCAMs) TCAM: еҸҜд»Ҙе…үйҖҹиҜ»еҸ–ең°еқҖ Switching Fabric е°Ҷ Datagram д»Һ Input Port иҪ¬з§»еҲ° Output Port зҡ„з»“жһ„ Switching Fabric дёүз§Қдё»иҰҒзҡ„ Fabric жһ¶жһ„ Architecture Via Memoryе…Ҳе…ЁйғЁеҶҷе…ҘеҶ…еӯҳгҖҒеҶҚе…ЁйғЁд»ҺеҶ…еӯҳйҮҢиҜ»еҸ–гҖҗеҠЈеҠҝгҖ‘IO еҫҲж…ў Via BusSwitching Speed зҡ„з“¶йўҲжҳҜ Bus зҡ„ Bandwidth Via Interconnection Networkе…ЁиҝһжҺҘгҖҗж”№иҝӣгҖ‘Parallelism + Multi-stage SwitchingDatagram еңЁиҝӣе…Ҙ Fabric зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷиў«еҲҮеүІжҲҗеӣәе®ҡй•ҝеәҰзҡ„ cellsиҝҷдәӣ cells иҝӣе…Ҙе№іиЎҢзҡ„ smaller switchжңҖеҗҺз»„иЈ…жҲҗеҺҹжқҘзҡ„ DatagramMultistage Input Port Queuing дјҡеҜјиҮҙпјҡ Head-of-the-Line (HOL) blocking: queued datagram at front of queue prevents others in queue from moving forward Queuing Delay: дёҚеҗҢ Port зҡ„еҸ‘еҗ‘еҗҢдёҖдёӘ Output port зҡ„ Datagram е өдҪҸдәҶгҖӮ Packet(Datagram) Loss Output Port Queuing Buffering required when datagrams arrive from fabric **faster than link transmission rate**. Drop policy: which datagrams to drop if no free buffers? иЎЁжҳҺдәҶ Packet could be lost. Scheduling discipline chooses among queued datagrams for transmission Priority scheduling вҖ“ who gets best performance, network neutrality Buffer еӨ§е°ҸеӨҡе°‘еҗҲйҖӮпјҹRFC3439 и§„е®ҡ BufferВ size=RTTГ—LinkВ CapacityВ C\text{Buffer size\(=\)RTT\(\times\)Link Capacity \(C\)}BufferВ size=RTTГ—LinkВ CapacityВ C.д№ҹжңүз”Ё BufferВ size=RTTГ—LinkВ CapacityВ CГ·#В ofВ FlowsВ NВ \text{Buffer size\(=\)RTT\(\times\)Link Capacity \(C\div \sqrt{\text{\# of Flows }N}\) }BufferВ size=RTTГ—LinkВ CapacityВ CГ·#В ofВ FlowsВ NвҖӢ too much buffering can increase delays long RTTs: poor performance for real-time apps, sluggish TCP response Buffer Management Drop policy Tail drop: жү”жҺүеҗҺйқўжқҘзҡ„ packet Priority: жҢүдјҳе…Ҳзә§жү” Mark: жҠҠ packet ж Үи®°дёә ECNпјҲжңүйҳ»еЎһпјү Scheduling: дёӢдёҖж¬ЎеҸ‘йҖҒе“ӘдёӘ packet? First-Come-First-Serve Priority жҠҠ packet еҲҶзұ»жҲҗеӨҡдёӘ classпјҢжҜҸж¬Ўд»ҺжңҖй«ҳдјҳе…Ҳзә§зҡ„ class йҮҢжҢ‘дёҖдёӘ packet еҸ‘йҖҒ жҜҸдёӘ class еҶ…йғЁжҳҜ FCFS зҡ„ Round-Robin жҠҠ packet еҲҶзұ»жҲҗеӨҡдёӘ classпјҢжҜҸж¬Ўд»ҺжҹҗдёӘ class йҮҢжҢ‘дёҖдёӘ packet еҸ‘йҖҒ иҪ®жөҒд»Һ class йҮҢйҖүдёҖдёӘ packet еҸ‘йҖҒ Weighted Fair Queueing Round-Robin зҡ„жҺЁе№ҝгҖӮиөӢдәҲжҜҸдёӘ class дёҖдёӘжқғйҮҚ Minimum Bandwidth Guarantee

title: Routing Algorithms
content: Routing Networks Routing Algorithm зҡ„д»»еҠЎжҳҜеңЁжө©зҖҡзҡ„ Router зҪ‘з»ңйҮҢпјҢжүҫеҲ°дёҖжқЎ Good Path иҝһжҺҘ Sending Host е’Ң Receiving Host. What is Path? Sequence of routers that packets traverse from sending host to receiving host How to define Good? May vary. вҖңLeast costвҖқ, вҖңleast congestionвҖқ, вҖңfastestвҖқвҖҰ Abstraction жҠҠ Network и§Ҷдёәж— еҗ‘еӣҫпјҢRouters дҪңдёәиҠӮзӮ№пјҢPhysical Link дҪңдёәж— еҗ‘иҫ№гҖӮ Link State Link State з®—жі•д»Ҙ DijkstraвҖҷs Algorithm дҪңдёәжЁЎжқҝпјҢз”ұдәҺйңҖиҰҒзҹҘжҷ“ж•ҙеј ж— еҗ‘еӣҫзҡ„дҝЎжҒҜпјҢеӣ жӯӨпјҢLink State жҳҜ Global зҡ„пјҢеңЁе®һзҺ°дёҠеҸӘиғҪжҳҜ Centralized зҡ„гҖӮ з®—жі•жң¬иә«жҜ”иҫғз®ҖеҚ•пјҢе®һйҷ…дёҠе°ұжҳҜ Dijkstra еҚ•жәҗжңҖзҹӯи·Ҝз®—жі•зҡ„жөҒзЁӢгҖӮ д»Ҙ Source Node дёәиө·зӮ№и®Ўз®—е®Ң Dijkstra з®—жі•еҗҺпјҢдјҡеҪўжҲҗдёҖеј  Forward Table дҝқеӯҳеңЁ Source Node зҡ„ Router йҮҢгҖӮ Algorithm ComplexityеҸҜд»ҘеҒҡеҲ° O(nlogвҒЎn)O(n\log n)O(nlogn) зҡ„еӨҚжқӮеәҰ Message ComplexityжҜҸдёӘ Router йғҪиҰҒз»ҷ Centre еҸ‘йҖҒиҮӘе·ұеҲ°е…¶д»– nnn дёӘ Routerзҡ„ Link дҝЎжҒҜпјҢж”¶йӣҶиҝҷдёӘдҝЎжҒҜжҳҜ O(n)O(n)O(n) зҡ„гҖӮеӣ жӯӨжҖ»ж—¶й—ҙеӨҚжқӮеәҰжҳҜ O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2) зҡ„гҖӮ Oscillation еңЁ Dynamic Load Cost зҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢеҸҜиғҪдјҡдә§з”ҹ Route Oscillation зҡ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ Distance Vector Distance Vector д»Ҙ Bellman-Ford з®—жі•дёәжЁЎжқҝи®ҫи®Ў Dx(y)=minвҒЎv{cx,v+Dv(y)}D_x(y)=\min_v\{c_{x,v}+D_v(y)\} DxвҖӢ(y)=vminвҖӢ{cx,vвҖӢ+DvвҖӢ(y)} иҝҷдёӘз®—жі•жҳҜ Distributed зҡ„гҖӮ Key PointпјҡжҜҸдёӘ Router еҗ‘ Neighbor еҸ‘йҖҒиҮӘе·ұзҡ„ Distance Vector Estimate жҺҘеҸ—еҲ° DV д№ӢеҗҺпјҢжӣҙж–°иҮӘе·ұзҡ„ DVпјҡ Dx(y)вҶҗminвҒЎv(cx,v+Dv(y)),вҲҖyвҲҲND_x(y)\gets \min_v(c_{x,v}+D_v(y)),\forall y\in NDxвҖӢ(y)вҶҗminvвҖӢ(cx,vвҖӢ+DvвҖӢ(y)),вҲҖyвҲҲN flowchart TB; A["`**Wait** for change in local link cost / DV msg from neighbor`"] --> B["`**Recompute** DV estimates`"] B --> C[if DV changes, send it to neighbor; else do nothing] C --> A Iterative Asynchronous Distributed Self-stopping Another View жҲ‘д»¬д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҠҠ DV з®—жі•зҡ„жөҒзЁӢзңӢжҲҗжҳҜ State Information Diffusion. жңҖејҖе§Ӣзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢеҸӘжңү uuu зҹҘйҒ“ uuu router зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜ йҡҸзқҖдәӢд»¶зҡ„жҺЁз§»пјҢи¶ҠжқҘи¶ҠеӨҡзҡ„ router зҹҘйҒ“ uuu зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ Link Cost Changes Node жЈҖжөӢеҲ° Local Link Cost ж”№еҸҳ жӣҙж–° Routing дҝЎжҒҜпјҢи®Ўз®—ж–°зҡ„ DV еҰӮжһң DV жӣҙж–°дәҶпјҢйӮЈд№ҲеҸ‘йҖҒ Message Complexity: Convergence Time varies.

title: TLB: Translation Lookaside Buffer
content: TLB, Translation Lookaside Buffer еҰӮеҗҚеӯ—жүҖзӨәпјҢе’Ң Memory Cache дёҖж ·пјҢзі»з»ҹдјҡжҠҠжҜ”иҫғйў‘з№Ғзҡ„ Virtual Address to RAM Address Translation Mapping зј“еӯҳдёӢжқҘгҖӮйҖҡеёёдҪҚдәҺ CPU ж—Ғиҫ№ Buffer/Cache зҡ„еҺҹеҲҷпјҡгҖ”Principle of **Locality**гҖ•гҖҗTemporal localityгҖ‘An instruction or data item that has been recently accessed will likely be re-accessed soon in the futureгҖҗSpatial localityгҖ‘A program accesses memory at address x, likely to access memory near x in the nearby future Translation Process TLB зҡ„з»“жһ„ TLB is Content-addressed associative memory. жҜҸдёҖдёӘ entry йғҪз”ұ Virtual Page Number + RAM Frame Number + Other Info з»„жҲҗгҖӮ з»ҷе®ҡдёҖдёӘ Virtual Page NumberпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙ Parallel ең°жҹҘжүҫ TLB зҡ„ VPN дёҖйЎ№гҖӮ иҝӣиЎҢзҝ»иҜ‘зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢжҠҠ Virtual Page Number зӣҙжҺҘжӣҝжҚўжҲҗ RAM Frame Number. TLB зҡ„й—®йўҳ еҪ“дёҖдёӘиҝӣзЁӢеңЁиҝҗиЎҢзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢTLB жҳҫз„¶еҸӘдҝқеӯҳиҝҷдёӘиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„ Address TranslationгҖӮеҪ“еҲҮжҚўеҲ°дёӢдёҖдёӘиҝӣзЁӢж—¶пјҢй—®йўҳе°ұжқҘдәҶпјҢTLB еә”иҜҘеңЁиҝӣзЁӢд№Ӣй—ҙе…ұдә«еҗ—пјҹ If not, йӮЈд№Ҳ CPU еҝ…йЎ»жё…з©ә TLBпјҢиҝҷж ·еҠҝеҝ…еҸ‘з”ҹдёҖе Ҷ TLB Cache miss. If yes, йӮЈд№Ҳ CPU еҝ…йЎ»йҳІжӯўе…¶д»–иҝӣзЁӢзҡ„ Virtual Address жұЎжҹ“еҪ“еүҚиҝӣзЁӢгҖӮ еҸҜд»Ҙз»ҷ TLB entry ж·»еҠ  Address Space IdentifierпјҢиЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘ entry еұһдәҺе“ӘдёӘиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„ translation TLB Entry Replacement Policy е’Ң Cache дёҖж ·пјҢTLB йҖҡеёё size дёҚдјҡеӨӘеӨ§пјҢж»ЎдәҶзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢе°ұйңҖиҰҒиёўжҺүж—§зҡ„ entry жқҘж”ҫж–°зҡ„ entryгҖӮ Least Recently Used Policy жҖ»жҳҜз§»йҷӨ has not recently been used

title: Semaphore
content: Semaphore Semaphore жҳҜ Dijkstra жҸҗеҮәзҡ„з”ЁдәҺи§ЈеҶіеҗҢжӯҘй—®йўҳзҡ„ж–№жЎҲгҖӮ Semaphore API дё»иҰҒжңү 333 дёӘйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„ APIпјҡ API Docs sem_init(&sem, p_shared, value) е°Ҷ semaphore зҡ„еҖји®ҫзҪ®дёә valuep_shared=0 иЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘ semaphore е°ҶеңЁдёҖдёӘиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„дёҚеҗҢзәҝзЁӢд№Ӣй—ҙе…ұдә«пјӣйқһ 000 иЎЁзӨәеңЁдёҚеҗҢиҝӣзЁӢд№Ӣй—ҙе…ұдә« sem_wait(&sem) еҰӮжһң sem >0\gt 0>0пјҢйӮЈд№Ҳе°Ҷе…¶еҖј вҲ’1-1вҲ’1 еҗҺз»§з»ӯпјӣеҗҰеҲҷйҳ»еЎһ sem_post(&sem) е°Ҷ sem зҡ„еҖј +1+1+1пјҢз«ӢеҲ»з»§з»ӯпјҢдёҚдјҡйҳ»еЎһгҖӮеҰӮжһңжңүиў«йҳ»еЎһзҡ„зәҝзЁӢпјҢе”ӨйҶ’е…¶дёӯдёҖдёӘгҖӮ жіЁж„ҸпјҢSemaphore е®һйҷ…дёҠеҸҜд»ҘеҲқе§ӢеҢ–дёәиҙҹж•°пјҢдҪҶжӯӨж—¶пјҢsemaphore зҡ„ж„Ҹд№үжҳҜжңүеӨҡе°‘зәҝзЁӢеңЁзӯүеҫ…гҖӮ иҝҷйҮҢ sem_wait() зҡ„жңәеҲ¶жҳҜпјҢжҖ»жҳҜе…Ҳ вҲ’1-1вҲ’1пјҢдҪҶжҳҜеҸӘжңүеҪ“ sem зҡ„еҖј >0\gt 0>0 д№ӢеҗҺжүҚеҒңжӯўйҳ»еЎһпјҢеӣ жӯӨ sem зҡ„еҖје…Ғи®ёиҙҹж•°гҖӮ Semaphore зҡ„и§’иүІдёҺе…¶еҲқеҖј е°Ҷ Semaphore еҲқе§ӢеҢ–дёәдёҚеҗҢзҡ„еҖјеҸҜд»ҘеҒҡеҲ°дёҚеҗҢзҡ„ TaskгҖӮ Binary Semaphore = MutEx Lock и§ҒгҖҗPage 4пјҢFigure 31.5гҖ‘ Semaphore: Waiting for Prerequisites е°Ҷ Semaphore и®ҫдёә 000 жқҘзӯүеҫ… 111 дёӘеӯҗзәҝзЁӢз»“жқҹе№¶йҖҖеҮәгҖӮ Semaphore: еҰӮдҪ•и®ҫзҪ®еҲқеҖјпјҹ дёҖз§Қз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„жҖқиҖғж–№жЎҲпјҡеҪ“еҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҲҡеҲҡе®ҢжҲҗзҡ„пјҢеҸҜд»Ҙз«ӢеҲ»з»ҷеҮәеҺ»еӨҡе°‘иө„жәҗпјҹ дҫӢеҰӮпјҢеҜ№дәҺ Lock зҡ„еңәжҷҜпјҢжҲ‘еҸӘе…Ғи®ёдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢеҗҢж—¶е№Іжҙ»пјҢиҖҢдё”еҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺзәҝзЁӢеҸҜд»Ҙз«ӢеҲ»ејҖе§Ӣе№Іжҙ»пјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ semaphore зҡ„еҖје°ұжҳҜ 111гҖӮ еҜ№дәҺ Prerequisite зҡ„еңәжҷҜпјҢеҲҡеҲҡеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҲҗд№ӢеҗҺпјҢжҲ‘еҝ…йЎ»зӯүжүҖжңүеӯҗзәҝзЁӢе®ҢжҲҗпјҢеӣ жӯӨдёҚиғҪи®©дё»зәҝзЁӢз«ӢеҲ»ејҖе§Ӣе№Іжҙ»пјҢеӣ жӯӨи®ҫдёә 000гҖӮ

title: Scheduling: Multi-Level Feedback Queue
content: Multi-Level Feedback Queue Problems to Handleпјҡж— жі•еҫ—зҹҘ Perfect Knowledge of Jobs зҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢ Minimize Turn-Around Time Minimize Response Time (еҜ№дәҺйӮЈдәӣ Interactive Tasks иҖҢиЁҖ) MLFQ з¬¬дёҖзүҲ жҲ‘д»¬ж–°и§„е®ҡдёүжқЎи§„еҲҷ RuleВ 3.\text{Rule 3}.RuleВ 3. еҪ“дёҖдёӘ Task еҲҡеҠ е…Ҙзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢиў«зӣҙжҺҘж”ҫиҝӣ Highest Priority Queue RuleВ 4a.\text{Rule 4a}.RuleВ 4a. еҪ“дёҖдёӘ Process з”Ёе®ҢжүҖжңү Quantum Length зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢе…¶ Priority йҷҚдҪҺ RuleВ 4b.\text{Rule 4b}.RuleВ 4b. еҰӮжһң Task дё»еҠЁж”ҫејғдҪҝз”Ё CPUпјҲдҫӢеҰӮжү§иЎҢ I/OпјүпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳ OS и®ӨдёәиҝҷдёӘ Task жҳҜ Interactive зҡ„д»»еҠЎпјҢдҝқз•ҷеңЁеҪ“еүҚзҡ„ Queue йҮҢпјҲйҮҚзҪ® Quantum Lengthпјү й—®йўҳ MLFQ з¬¬дәҢзүҲ еҰӮеүҚйқўжүҖиҜҙпјҢдёәдәҶйҒҝе…Қ Lower-Priority зҡ„д»»еҠЎйҒӯйҒҮ StarvationпјҢжҲ‘д»¬йңҖиҰҒжҸҗеҚҮд»–д»¬зҡ„ Priority RuleВ 5.\text{Rule 5.}RuleВ 5. еңЁдёҖж®өж—¶й—ҙ SSS иҝҮеҗҺпјҢжҠҠжүҖжңү Tasks з§»еҠЁеҲ° Top-Most Queue MLFQ з¬¬дёүзүҲ Rule 4 RevisedRuleВ 4.В (New)\text{Rule 4.
